components/ChatWindow.tsx:            const exists = prev.some(m => m.id === newMsg.id);

components/ChatWindow.tsx:            
components/ChatWindow.tsx:            // On remplace le message optimiste correspondant s'il existe
components/ChatWindow.tsx:            // Les IDs temporaires sont longs (timestamps)

components/ChatWindow.tsx:                return newArr;
components/ChatWindow.tsx:            }

components/ChatWindow.tsx:            return [...prev, newMsg];
components/ChatWindow.tsx:        });
components/ChatWindow.tsx:        
components/ChatWindow.tsx:        // If message is from other user, mark as read immediately since window is open

components/ChatWindow.tsx:          senderId: m.sender_id,

components/ChatWindow.tsx:          createdAt: m.created_at,

components/ChatWindow.tsx:        console.warn("Erreur chargement messages (Mode démo possible)", err);

components/ChatWindow.tsx:    }

components/SecurityLock.tsx:export const SecurityLock: React.FC<Props> = ({ isEnabled, correctPin, biometricsEnabled, onUnlock, onReset }) => {
components/SecurityLock.tsx:  const [pin, setPin] = useState('');
components/SecurityLock.tsx:  const [isLocked, setIsLocked] = useState(isEnabled);
components/SecurityLock.tsx:  const [error, setError] = useState(false);
components/SecurityLock.tsx:  const [showResetConfirm, setShowResetConfirm] = useState(false);
components/SecurityLock.tsx:
components/SecurityLock.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
components/SecurityLock.tsx:    // Biometrics are disabled, only PIN acts as lock
components/SecurityLock.tsx:  }, [isEnabled]);
components/SecurityLock.tsx:
components/SecurityLock.tsx:  const handlePinSubmit = (digit: string) => {
components/SecurityLock.tsx:    if (pin.length >= 4) return;
components/SecurityLock.tsx:    
components/SecurityLock.tsx:    const newPin = pin + digit;
components/SecurityLock.tsx:    setPin(newPin);
components/SecurityLock.tsx:    
components/SecurityLock.tsx:    if (newPin.length === 4) {
components/SecurityLock.tsx:      if (newPin === correctPin) {
components/SecurityLock.tsx:        onUnlock();
components/SecurityLock.tsx:        setIsLocked(false);
components/SecurityLock.tsx:      } else {
components/SecurityLock.tsx:        setError(true);
components/SecurityLock.tsx:        setTimeout(() => {
components/SecurityLock.tsx:          setPin('');
components/SecurityLock.tsx:          setError(false);
components/SecurityLock.tsx:        }, 500);
components/SecurityLock.tsx:        toast.error("Code PIN incorrect");
components/SecurityLock.tsx:      }
components/SecurityLock.tsx:    }
components/SecurityLock.tsx:  };
components/SecurityLock.tsx:
components/SecurityLock.tsx:  const handleBackspace = () => {
components/SecurityLock.tsx:    setPin(pin.slice(0, -1));
components/SecurityLock.tsx:  };
components/SecurityLock.tsx:
components/SecurityLock.tsx:  if (!isLocked) return null;
components/SecurityLock.tsx:

components/DeliveryView.tsx:  const startTracking = (orderId: string) => {
components/DeliveryView.tsx:    if (!navigator.geolocation || isTracking) return;
components/DeliveryView.tsx:
components/DeliveryView.tsx:    try {
components/DeliveryView.tsx:      setIsTracking(true);
components/DeliveryView.tsx:      const id = navigator.geolocation.watchPosition(
components/DeliveryView.tsx:        async (position) => {
components/DeliveryView.tsx:          if (position?.coords) {
components/DeliveryView.tsx:            const { latitude, longitude } = position.coords;
components/DeliveryView.tsx:            if (orderId.startsWith('mock-')) {
components/DeliveryView.tsx:              const localOrdersStr = localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_mock_orders');
components/DeliveryView.tsx:              if (localOrdersStr) {
components/DeliveryView.tsx:                const localOrders = JSON.parse(localOrdersStr);
components/DeliveryView.tsx:                const updatedOrders = localOrders.map((o: any) => o.id === orderId ? { ...o, delivery_lat: latitude, delivery_lng: longitude } : o);
components/DeliveryView.tsx:                localStorage.setItem('dashmeals_mock_orders', JSON.stringify(updatedOrders));
components/DeliveryView.tsx:              }
components/DeliveryView.tsx:            } else {
components/DeliveryView.tsx:              await supabase
components/DeliveryView.tsx:                .from('orders')
components/DeliveryView.tsx:                .update({ delivery_lat: latitude, delivery_lng: longitude })
components/DeliveryView.tsx:                .eq('id', orderId);
components/DeliveryView.tsx:            }
components/DeliveryView.tsx:          }
components/DeliveryView.tsx:        },
components/DeliveryView.tsx:        (error) => console.error('Geolocation error:', error),
components/DeliveryView.tsx:        { enableHighAccuracy: false, maximumAge: 15000, timeout: 10000 }
components/DeliveryView.tsx:      );
components/DeliveryView.tsx:      setWatchId(id);
components/DeliveryView.tsx:    } catch (err) {
components/DeliveryView.tsx:      console.error('Synchronous watchPosition error caught:', err);
components/DeliveryView.tsx:      setIsTracking(false);
components/DeliveryView.tsx:    }
components/DeliveryView.tsx:  };
components/DeliveryView.tsx:
components/DeliveryView.tsx:  const stopTracking = () => {
components/DeliveryView.tsx:    if (watchId !== null) {
components/DeliveryView.tsx:      try {
components/DeliveryView.tsx:        navigator.geolocation.clearWatch(watchId);
components/DeliveryView.tsx:      } catch (err) {
components/DeliveryView.tsx:        console.error('Error clearing watch:', err);
components/DeliveryView.tsx:      }
components/DeliveryView.tsx:      setWatchId(null);
components/DeliveryView.tsx:    }
components/DeliveryView.tsx:    setIsTracking(false);
components/DeliveryView.tsx:  };

components/OrdersView.tsx:              }
components/OrdersView.tsx:          }

components/OrdersView.tsx:          if (confirmingOrder.id.startsWith('mock-')) {

components/OrdersView.tsx:              }
components/OrdersView.tsx:          } else {

components/OrdersView.tsx:                  .from('orders')

components/OrdersView.tsx:                      status: 'completed',
components/OrdersView.tsx:                      proof_url: proofUrl
components/OrdersView.tsx:                  })
components/OrdersView.tsx:                  .eq('id', confirmingOrder.id);
components/OrdersView.tsx:
components/OrdersView.tsx:              if (updateError) throw updateError;
components/OrdersView.tsx:          }
components/OrdersView.tsx:

components/OrdersView.tsx:          if (!confirmingOrder.id.startsWith('mock-')) {

components/OrdersView.tsx:                      order_id: confirmingOrder.id,
components/OrdersView.tsx:                      restaurant_id: confirmingOrder.restaurantId,

components/LocationPicker.tsx:const fetchAddress = async (lat: number, lng: number): Promise<{ address: string; city: string; country: string }> => {
components/LocationPicker.tsx:  try {
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    const res = await fetch(
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      `https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/reverse?format=json&lat=${lat}&lon=${lng}&addressdetails=1&email=contact@dashmeals.app`
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    );
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Erreur de géocodage");
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    const data = await res.json();
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    const city = data.address?.city || 
components/LocationPicker.tsx:                 data.address?.town || 
components/LocationPicker.tsx:                 data.address?.village || 
components/LocationPicker.tsx:                 data.address?.state ||
components/LocationPicker.tsx:                 (lat > -12 && lat < -11 && lng > 27 && lng < 28 ? 'Lubumbashi' : 'Position inconnue');
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    const country = data.address?.country || 'République Démocratique du Congo';
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    const displayName = data.display_name || `${lat.toFixed(4)}, ${lng.toFixed(4)}`;
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    return {
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      address: displayName,
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      city: city,
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      country: country
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    };
components/LocationPicker.tsx:  } catch (error) {
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    console.error("Reverse geocoding failed", error);
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    return {
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      address: `${lat.toFixed(4)}, ${lng.toFixed(4)}`,
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      city: lat > -12 && lat < -11 && lng > 27 && lng < 28 ? 'Lubumbashi' : 'Position inconnue',
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      country: 'RDC'
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    };
components/LocationPicker.tsx:  }

components/LocationPicker.tsx:  onLocationSelect

components/LocationPicker.tsx:}) => {
components/LocationPicker.tsx:  const map = useMapEvents({
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    async click(e) {
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      const newPos = { lat: e.latlng.lat, lng: e.latlng.lng };

components/LocationPicker.tsx:      onLocationSelect(locationData);

components/LocationPicker.tsx:    },
components/LocationPicker.tsx:  });

components/LocationPicker.tsx:  }, [position, map]);

components/LocationPicker.tsx:export const LocationPicker: React.FC<Props> = ({

components/LocationPicker.tsx:
components/LocationPicker.tsx:  // Sélectionner Lubumbashi par défaut

components/LocationPicker.tsx:      lat: LUBUMBASHI_COORDS[0],
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      lng: LUBUMBASHI_COORDS[1],
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      address: "Lubumbashi, Haut-Katanga, République Démocratique du Congo",

components/LocationPicker.tsx:
components/LocationPicker.tsx:  // Fonction pour détecter la position GPS avec gestion d'erreur améliorée
components/LocationPicker.tsx:  const locateUser = () => {
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    setIsLocating(true);
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    setError(null);
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    setLocationStatus('🔍 Activation du GPS...');
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    if (!('geolocation' in navigator)) {

components/LocationPicker.tsx:      toast.error(errorMsg);
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      setIsLocating(false);
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      return;
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    }
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    // Vérifier si c'est un mobile (avec GPS réel)
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    const isMobile = /Android|webOS|iPhone|iPad|iPod|BlackBerry|IEMobile|Opera Mini/i.test(navigator.userAgent);
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    if (!isMobile) {
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      toast.info("💡 Sur ordinateur, la position par IP peut être imprécise. Cliquez directement sur la carte pour sélectionner Lubumbashi.");
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      setLocationStatus("💡 Sur ordinateur, utilisez la carte pour sélectionner Lubumbashi");
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      setIsLocating(false);
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      return;
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    }
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    // Options pour mobile
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    const options = {
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      enableHighAccuracy: false,
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      timeout: 15000,
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      maximumAge: 300000
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    };
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    try {
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(
components/LocationPicker.tsx:        async (pos) => {
components/LocationPicker.tsx:          if (pos && pos.coords) {
components/LocationPicker.tsx:            const { latitude, longitude, accuracy } = pos.coords;
components/LocationPicker.tsx:            
components/LocationPicker.tsx:            console.log("📍 Position GPS mobile:", latitude, longitude);
components/LocationPicker.tsx:            
components/LocationPicker.tsx:            const { address, city, country } = await fetchAddress(latitude, longitude);
components/LocationPicker.tsx:            const newPos = { lat: latitude, lng: longitude, address, city, country };
components/LocationPicker.tsx:            
components/LocationPicker.tsx:            setPosition(newPos);
components/LocationPicker.tsx:            setMapCenter([latitude, longitude]);
components/LocationPicker.tsx:            setLocationStatus(`✅ Position GPS: ${city} (précision: ${Math.round(accuracy)}m)`);
components/LocationPicker.tsx:            
components/LocationPicker.tsx:            onLocationSelect(newPos);
components/LocationPicker.tsx:            toast.success(`📍 ${city} - Votre position GPS`);
components/LocationPicker.tsx:            setIsLocating(false);
components/LocationPicker.tsx:          } else {
components/LocationPicker.tsx:            throw new Error("Invalid position object");
components/LocationPicker.tsx:          }
components/LocationPicker.tsx:        },
components/LocationPicker.tsx:        (err) => {
components/LocationPicker.tsx:          // Formatage correct de l'erreur pour éviter le warning vide
components/LocationPicker.tsx:          let errorMessage = "";
components/LocationPicker.tsx:          switch (err.code) {
components/LocationPicker.tsx:            case err.PERMISSION_DENIED:
components/LocationPicker.tsx:              errorMessage = "❌ Permission GPS refusée. Activez la localisation dans les paramètres de votre appareil.";
components/LocationPicker.tsx:              break;
components/LocationPicker.tsx:            case err.POSITION_UNAVAILABLE:
components/LocationPicker.tsx:              errorMessage = "❌ Signal GPS indisponible. Assurez-vous d'être à l'extérieur ou près d'une fenêtre.";
components/LocationPicker.tsx:              break;
components/LocationPicker.tsx:            case err.TIMEOUT:
components/LocationPicker.tsx:              errorMessage = "⏱️ Délai GPS dépassé. Vérifiez votre connexion ou réessayez.";
components/LocationPicker.tsx:              break;
components/LocationPicker.tsx:            default:
components/LocationPicker.tsx:              errorMessage = `❌ Erreur GPS: ${err.message || "cause inconnue"}`;
components/LocationPicker.tsx:          }
components/LocationPicker.tsx:          console.error("Geo error:", errorMessage);  // Maintenant un message lisible
components/LocationPicker.tsx:          setError(errorMessage);
components/LocationPicker.tsx:          setLocationStatus(errorMessage);
components/LocationPicker.tsx:          toast.error(errorMessage);
components/LocationPicker.tsx:          setIsLocating(false);
components/LocationPicker.tsx:          
components/LocationPicker.tsx:          // Proposer Lubumbashi
components/LocationPicker.tsx:          setTimeout(() => {
components/LocationPicker.tsx:            toast.info("💡 Utilisez le bouton 'Lubumbashi' ou cliquez sur la carte");
components/LocationPicker.tsx:          }, 2000);
components/LocationPicker.tsx:        },
components/LocationPicker.tsx:        options
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      );
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    } catch (syncError: any) {
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      console.error("Location picker synchronous GPS error caught:", syncError);
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      const errorMessage = "❌ Échec de l'accès au service de position. Sélectionnez une ville ou cliquez sur la carte.";
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      setError(errorMessage);
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      setLocationStatus(errorMessage);
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      toast.error(errorMessage);
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      setIsLocating(false);
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    }
components/LocationPicker.tsx:  };
components/LocationPicker.tsx:
components/LocationPicker.tsx:  // Fonction pour aller à une ville spécifique
components/LocationPicker.tsx:  const goToCity = (cityName: string) => {
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    const coords = CITY_COORDINATES[cityName];
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    if (coords) {
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      setMapCenter(coords);
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      if (cityName === 'Lubumbashi') {
components/LocationPicker.tsx:        selectLubumbashi();
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      } else {

components/LocationPicker.tsx:        toast.info(`Affichage de ${cityName} - Cliquez sur la carte pour sélectionner`);
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      }
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    }
components/LocationPicker.tsx:  };
components/LocationPicker.tsx:
components/LocationPicker.tsx:  // Initialiser avec Lubumbashi (pas de détection automatique)
components/LocationPicker.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    if (!initialLocation) {
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      selectLubumbashi();
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    } else {
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      setPosition(initialLocation);
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      setMapCenter([initialLocation.lat, initialLocation.lng]);
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    }
components/LocationPicker.tsx:  }, []);
components/LocationPicker.tsx:
components/LocationPicker.tsx:  return (
components/LocationPicker.tsx:    <div className="space-y-4">
components/LocationPicker.tsx:      {/* Barre de contrôle */}

components/LocationPicker.tsx:        {/* BOUTON LUBUMBASHI - PRINCIPAL */}
components/LocationPicker.tsx:        <button

components/LocationPicker.tsx:          onClick={selectLubumbashi}

components/LocationPicker.tsx:        >
components/LocationPicker.tsx:          <MapPin size={18} />
components/LocationPicker.tsx:          📍 Lubumbashi
components/LocationPicker.tsx:        </button>
components/LocationPicker.tsx:        
components/LocationPicker.tsx:        {/* Bouton GPS - visible uniquement sur mobile */}
components/LocationPicker.tsx:        <button
components/LocationPicker.tsx:          type="button"
components/LocationPicker.tsx:          onClick={locateUser}
components/LocationPicker.tsx:          disabled={isLocating}
components/LocationPicker.tsx:          className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-brand-600 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-bold hover:bg-brand-700 transition-colors disabled:opacity-50 md:opacity-70"

components/PinSetupDialog.tsx:  const handlePinSubmit = (digit: string) => {

components/PinSetupDialog.tsx:      if (pin.length >= 4) return;
components/PinSetupDialog.tsx:      const newPin = pin + digit;

components/PinSetupDialog.tsx:      }
components/PinSetupDialog.tsx:    } else {
components/PinSetupDialog.tsx:      if (confirmPin.length >= 4) return;
components/PinSetupDialog.tsx:      const newPin = confirmPin + digit;

components/PinSetupDialog.tsx:        } else {

components/SplashScreen.tsx:
components/SplashScreen.tsx:export const SplashScreen = ({ onFinish }: { onFinish: () => void }) => {
components/SplashScreen.tsx:  const [isVisible, setIsVisible] = useState(true);
components/SplashScreen.tsx:

components/SplashScreen.tsx:    const timer = setTimeout(() => {
components/SplashScreen.tsx:      setIsVisible(false);
components/SplashScreen.tsx:      setTimeout(onFinish, 200); // Faster fade out
components/SplashScreen.tsx:    }, 800); // Shorter splash duration (800ms)
components/SplashScreen.tsx:
components/SplashScreen.tsx:    return () => clearTimeout(timer);
components/SplashScreen.tsx:  }, [onFinish]);
components/SplashScreen.tsx:
components/SplashScreen.tsx:  if (!isVisible) return null;
components/SplashScreen.tsx:
components/SplashScreen.tsx:  return (
components/SplashScreen.tsx:    <div className={`fixed inset-0 z-[100] flex items-center justify-center bg-brand-600 transition-opacity duration-500 ${isVisible ? 'opacity-100' : 'opacity-0'}`}>
components/SplashScreen.tsx:      <div className="relative w-full h-full">
components/SplashScreen.tsx:        <img 
components/SplashScreen.tsx:            src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1504674900247-0877df9cc836?q=80&w=2070&auto=format&fit=crop"

components/CustomerView.tsx:  const lastScrollY = useRef(0);
components/CustomerView.tsx:
components/CustomerView.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
components/CustomerView.tsx:    const handleScroll = (e: Event) => {
components/CustomerView.tsx:      const target = e.target as any;
components/CustomerView.tsx:      if (!target) return;
components/CustomerView.tsx:      
components/CustomerView.tsx:      let currentScrollY = 0;
components/CustomerView.tsx:      if (target === document || target === window || target.nodeName === '#document') {
components/CustomerView.tsx:        currentScrollY = window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop || document.body.scrollTop;
components/CustomerView.tsx:      } else if (typeof target.scrollTop === 'number') {
components/CustomerView.tsx:        currentScrollY = target.scrollTop;
components/CustomerView.tsx:      } else {
components/CustomerView.tsx:        return;
components/CustomerView.tsx:      }
components/CustomerView.tsx:      
components/CustomerView.tsx:      // Prevent unnecessary changes if scroll difference is too small
components/CustomerView.tsx:      if (Math.abs(currentScrollY - lastScrollY.current) < 5) return;
components/CustomerView.tsx:      
components/CustomerView.tsx:      if (currentScrollY <= 20) {
components/CustomerView.tsx:        setIsNavVisible(true);
components/CustomerView.tsx:      } else if (currentScrollY > lastScrollY.current) {

components/CustomerView.tsx:        // or any other error, we handle it.

components/CustomerView.tsx:            throw error;
components/CustomerView.tsx:        }

components/CustomerView.tsx:
components/CustomerView.tsx:// Helper function to resize and compress avatar photos to lightweight thumbnail sizes (max 150x150)
components/CustomerView.tsx:const compressAndResizeImage = (file: File, maxWidth = 150, maxHeight = 150): Promise<string> => {
components/CustomerView.tsx:  return new Promise((resolve) => {
components/CustomerView.tsx:    const reader = new FileReader();
components/CustomerView.tsx:    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
components/CustomerView.tsx:    reader.onload = (event) => {
components/CustomerView.tsx:      const img = new Image();
components/CustomerView.tsx:      img.src = event.target?.result as string;
components/CustomerView.tsx:      img.onload = () => {
components/CustomerView.tsx:        const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
components/CustomerView.tsx:        let width = img.width;
components/CustomerView.tsx:        let height = img.height;
components/CustomerView.tsx:
components/CustomerView.tsx:        if (width > height) {
components/CustomerView.tsx:          if (width > maxWidth) {
components/CustomerView.tsx:            height = Math.round((height * maxWidth) / width);
components/CustomerView.tsx:            width = maxWidth;
components/CustomerView.tsx:          }
components/CustomerView.tsx:        } else {
components/CustomerView.tsx:          if (height > maxHeight) {

components/CustomerView.tsx:        }

components/CustomerView.tsx:        canvas.width = width;
components/CustomerView.tsx:        canvas.height = height;

components/CustomerView.tsx:        } else {

components/CustomerView.tsx:        }

components/CustomerView.tsx:      startScroll();
components/CustomerView.tsx:
components/CustomerView.tsx:      // Pause on hover/touch
components/CustomerView.tsx:      const pauseScroll = () => clearInterval(scrollInterval);
components/CustomerView.tsx:      carousel.addEventListener('mouseenter', pauseScroll);
components/CustomerView.tsx:      carousel.addEventListener('mouseleave', startScroll);

components/CustomerView.tsx:

components/CustomerView.tsx:          clearInterval(scrollInterval);

components/CustomerView.tsx:  // Geolocation Function
components/CustomerView.tsx:  const refreshLocation = () => {
components/CustomerView.tsx:    setUserState(prev => ({ ...prev, loadingLocation: true, locationError: null }));
components/CustomerView.tsx:    
components/CustomerView.tsx:    if (!navigator.geolocation) {

components/CustomerView.tsx:    }
components/CustomerView.tsx:
components/CustomerView.tsx:    try {
components/CustomerView.tsx:      // Use coordinates from the user's selected city at registration as fallback
components/CustomerView.tsx:      const userCity = user?.city || 'Kinshasa';
components/CustomerView.tsx:      const cityCoords = CITY_COORDINATES[userCity] || { latitude: KINSHASA_CENTER_LAT, longitude: KINSHASA_CENTER_LNG };
components/CustomerView.tsx:
components/CustomerView.tsx:      // Add a faster safety timeout for the UI (7 seconds as per user request)
components/CustomerView.tsx:      const uiSafetyTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
components/CustomerView.tsx:          setUserState(prev => {
components/CustomerView.tsx:              if (prev.loadingLocation) {
components/CustomerView.tsx:                  console.warn(`📍 [Location] UI Safety timeout triggered. Using fallback for ${userCity}.`);
components/CustomerView.tsx:                  return {
components/CustomerView.tsx:                    ...prev,
components/CustomerView.tsx:                    location: prev.location || cityCoords,
components/CustomerView.tsx:                    locationError: "Temps d'attente GPS dépassé. Utilisation de votre ville par défaut.",
components/CustomerView.tsx:                    loadingLocation: false
components/CustomerView.tsx:                  };
components/CustomerView.tsx:              }
components/CustomerView.tsx:              return prev;
components/CustomerView.tsx:          });
components/CustomerView.tsx:      }, 7000);
components/CustomerView.tsx:
components/CustomerView.tsx:      navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(
components/CustomerView.tsx:        (position) => {
components/CustomerView.tsx:          clearTimeout(uiSafetyTimeout);
components/CustomerView.tsx:          if (position?.coords) {
components/CustomerView.tsx:            setUserState({
components/CustomerView.tsx:              location: {
components/CustomerView.tsx:                latitude: position.coords.latitude,
components/CustomerView.tsx:                longitude: position.coords.longitude,
components/CustomerView.tsx:              },
components/CustomerView.tsx:              locationError: null,
components/CustomerView.tsx:              loadingLocation: false
components/CustomerView.tsx:            });
components/CustomerView.tsx:          } else {
components/CustomerView.tsx:            throw new Error("Invalid position object");
components/CustomerView.tsx:          }
components/CustomerView.tsx:        },
components/CustomerView.tsx:        (error) => {
components/CustomerView.tsx:          clearTimeout(uiSafetyTimeout);
components/CustomerView.tsx:          console.warn("Geo error:", error);
components/CustomerView.tsx:          // Fallback to IP geolocation if GPS fails
components/CustomerView.tsx:          fetch('https://ipapi.co/json/')
components/CustomerView.tsx:            .then(res => res.json())
components/CustomerView.tsx:            .then(data => {
components/CustomerView.tsx:              if (data && data.latitude && data.longitude) {

components/CustomerView.tsx:                    latitude: data.latitude,
components/CustomerView.tsx:                    longitude: data.longitude
components/CustomerView.tsx:                  },
components/CustomerView.tsx:                  locationError: "Position GPS introuvable. Utilisation de la position réseau.",
components/CustomerView.tsx:                  loadingLocation: false
components/CustomerView.tsx:                });
components/CustomerView.tsx:              } else {
components/CustomerView.tsx:                throw new Error("IP Geo failed");
components/CustomerView.tsx:              }
components/CustomerView.tsx:            })
components/CustomerView.tsx:            .catch(err => {
components/CustomerView.tsx:              setUserState({
components/CustomerView.tsx:                  location: {
components/CustomerView.tsx:                      latitude: KINSHASA_CENTER_LAT,
components/CustomerView.tsx:                      longitude: KINSHASA_CENTER_LNG
components/CustomerView.tsx:                  },
components/CustomerView.tsx:                  locationError: "Position introuvable. Utilisation de la position par défaut (Kinshasa).",
components/CustomerView.tsx:                  loadingLocation: false
components/CustomerView.tsx:              });
components/CustomerView.tsx:            });
components/CustomerView.tsx:        },
components/CustomerView.tsx:        { enableHighAccuracy: false, timeout: 8000, maximumAge: 600000 }
components/CustomerView.tsx:      );
components/CustomerView.tsx:    } catch (syncError) {
components/CustomerView.tsx:      console.error("Synchronous getCurrentPosition error caught:", syncError);
components/CustomerView.tsx:      // Fallback to network estimation
components/CustomerView.tsx:      fetch('https://ipapi.co/json/')
components/CustomerView.tsx:        .then(res => res.json())
components/CustomerView.tsx:        .then(data => {
components/CustomerView.tsx:          if (data && data.latitude && data.longitude) {
components/CustomerView.tsx:            setUserState({
components/CustomerView.tsx:              location: {
components/CustomerView.tsx:                latitude: data.latitude,
components/CustomerView.tsx:                longitude: data.longitude
components/CustomerView.tsx:              },
components/CustomerView.tsx:              locationError: "Position GPS inaccessible. Utilisation de la position réseau.",
components/CustomerView.tsx:              loadingLocation: false
components/CustomerView.tsx:            });
components/CustomerView.tsx:          } else {
components/CustomerView.tsx:            throw new Error("IP Geo failed");
components/CustomerView.tsx:          }
components/CustomerView.tsx:        })
components/CustomerView.tsx:        .catch(err => {
components/CustomerView.tsx:          setUserState({
components/CustomerView.tsx:              location: {
components/CustomerView.tsx:                  latitude: KINSHASA_CENTER_LAT,
components/CustomerView.tsx:                  longitude: KINSHASA_CENTER_LNG

components/CustomerView.tsx:  useEffect(() => {

components/CustomerView.tsx:    setTimeout(() => {

components/CustomerView.tsx:

components/CustomerView.tsx:      if (selectedCity && selectedCity !== 'Toutes') {

components/CustomerView.tsx:        candidates = candidates.filter(r => r.city && r.city.toLowerCase().trim() === normalizedCity);
components/CustomerView.tsx:      } else if (user && user.city) {
components/CustomerView.tsx:        // Fallback to user's city if search is not for all cities

components/CustomerView.tsx:        candidates = candidates.filter(r => r.city && r.city.toLowerCase().trim() === normalizedUserCity);
components/CustomerView.tsx:      }
components/CustomerView.tsx:
components/CustomerView.tsx:      // If no open candidates exist in the city, fallback to any active/online ones in the city
components/CustomerView.tsx:      if (candidates.length === 0) {
components/CustomerView.tsx:        candidates = restaurants.filter(r => r.isActive !== false && r.isOnline !== false);
components/CustomerView.tsx:        if (selectedCity && selectedCity !== 'Toutes') {
components/CustomerView.tsx:          const normalizedCity = selectedCity.toLowerCase().trim();
components/CustomerView.tsx:          candidates = candidates.filter(r => r.city && r.city.toLowerCase().trim() === normalizedCity);
components/CustomerView.tsx:        } else if (user && user.city) {
components/CustomerView.tsx:          const normalizedUserCity = user.city.toLowerCase().trim();
components/CustomerView.tsx:          candidates = candidates.filter(r => r.city && r.city.toLowerCase().trim() === normalizedUserCity);
components/CustomerView.tsx:        }
components/CustomerView.tsx:      }
components/CustomerView.tsx:
components/CustomerView.tsx:      // Sort criteria to find the fastest/closest option:
components/CustomerView.tsx:      // 1st: lowest preparationTime (sensible default of 15 min if missing, which is common for snacks/fast-food)
components/CustomerView.tsx:      // 2nd: closest distance
components/CustomerView.tsx:      const sorted = [...candidates].sort((a, b) => {
components/CustomerView.tsx:        const prepA = a.preparationTime !== undefined && a.preparationTime !== null ? a.preparationTime : 15;
components/CustomerView.tsx:        const prepB = b.preparationTime !== undefined && b.preparationTime !== null ? b.preparationTime : 15;
components/CustomerView.tsx:        if (prepA !== prepB) {
components/CustomerView.tsx:          return prepA - prepB;
components/CustomerView.tsx:        }
components/CustomerView.tsx:        const distA = a.distance !== undefined && !isNaN(a.distance) ? a.distance : 9999;
components/CustomerView.tsx:        const distB = b.distance !== undefined && !isNaN(b.distance) ? b.distance : 9999;
components/CustomerView.tsx:        return distA - distB;
components/CustomerView.tsx:      });
components/CustomerView.tsx:
components/CustomerView.tsx:      const closest = sorted[0];
components/CustomerView.tsx:
components/CustomerView.tsx:      setIsSearchingUrgent(false);
components/CustomerView.tsx:      
components/CustomerView.tsx:      if (closest) {
components/CustomerView.tsx:        setUrgentRestaurant(closest);

components/CustomerView.tsx:      } else {

components/CustomerView.tsx:          window.history.back();
components/CustomerView.tsx:        } else {
components/CustomerView.tsx:          setUrgentMode(false);
components/CustomerView.tsx:        }

components/CustomerView.tsx:    } else if (sortBy === 'distance') {
components/CustomerView.tsx:        list = [...list].sort((a, b) => (a.distance || 0) - (b.distance || 0));
components/CustomerView.tsx:    } else if (sortBy === 'time') {

components/CustomerView.tsx:    }

components/DebugLogger.tsx:interface LogEntry {
components/DebugLogger.tsx:  type: 'log' | 'warn' | 'error';
components/DebugLogger.tsx:  msg: string;

components/DebugLogger.tsx:}
components/DebugLogger.tsx:
components/DebugLogger.tsx:export const DebugLogger = () => {
components/DebugLogger.tsx:    const [logs, setLogs] = useState<LogEntry[]>([]);
components/DebugLogger.tsx:    const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState(false);
components/DebugLogger.tsx:    const logsEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
components/DebugLogger.tsx:
components/DebugLogger.tsx:    useEffect(() => {
components/DebugLogger.tsx:        const originalLog = console.log;
components/DebugLogger.tsx:        const originalWarn = console.warn;
components/DebugLogger.tsx:        const originalError = console.error;
components/DebugLogger.tsx:
components/DebugLogger.tsx:        const intercept = (type: 'log'|'warn'|'error', originalFn: Function, args: any[]) => {
components/DebugLogger.tsx:            originalFn(...args);
components/DebugLogger.tsx:            
components/DebugLogger.tsx:            try {
components/DebugLogger.tsx:                const msg = args.map(a => {
components/DebugLogger.tsx:                    if (a instanceof Error) return a.message;
components/DebugLogger.tsx:                    if (typeof a === 'object') {
components/DebugLogger.tsx:                        try { return JSON.stringify(a); } catch (e) { return '[Object]'; }
components/DebugLogger.tsx:                    }
components/DebugLogger.tsx:                    return String(a);
components/DebugLogger.tsx:                }).join(' ');
components/DebugLogger.tsx:                
components/DebugLogger.tsx:                // Filter noise
components/DebugLogger.tsx:                if (msg.includes('The above error occurred') || msg.includes('React expects')) return;
components/DebugLogger.tsx:                
components/DebugLogger.tsx:                setLogs(prev => [...prev.slice(-99), { type, msg, time: new Date() }]);
components/DebugLogger.tsx:            } catch (e) {
components/DebugLogger.tsx:                // Ignore circular serialization errors
components/DebugLogger.tsx:            }
components/DebugLogger.tsx:        };
components/DebugLogger.tsx:
components/DebugLogger.tsx:        console.log = (...args) => intercept('log', originalLog, args);
components/DebugLogger.tsx:        console.warn = (...args) => intercept('warn', originalWarn, args);
components/DebugLogger.tsx:        console.error = (...args) => intercept('error', originalError, args);
components/DebugLogger.tsx:
components/DebugLogger.tsx:        return () => {
components/DebugLogger.tsx:            console.log = originalLog;
components/DebugLogger.tsx:            console.warn = originalWarn;
components/DebugLogger.tsx:            console.error = originalError;
components/DebugLogger.tsx:        };
components/DebugLogger.tsx:    }, []);

components/DebugLogger.tsx:    useEffect(() => {
components/DebugLogger.tsx:        if (expanded && logsEndRef.current) {

components/DebugLogger.tsx:        }
components/DebugLogger.tsx:    }, [logs, expanded]);
components/DebugLogger.tsx:
components/DebugLogger.tsx:    if (logs.length === 0) return null;
components/DebugLogger.tsx:
components/DebugLogger.tsx:    const lastLog = logs[logs.length - 1];

components/DebugLogger.tsx:    return (

components/StoryViewer.tsx:  const [progress, setProgress] = useState(0);

components/StoryViewer.tsx:  
components/StoryViewer.tsx:  const currentPromo = promotions[currentIndex];
components/StoryViewer.tsx:  const DURATION = 5000; // 5 seconds per image
components/StoryViewer.tsx:
components/StoryViewer.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
components/StoryViewer.tsx:    setProgress(0);
components/StoryViewer.tsx:    const interval = setInterval(() => {
components/StoryViewer.tsx:      if (currentPromo && currentPromo.mediaType === 'image') {
components/StoryViewer.tsx:        setProgress(old => {
components/StoryViewer.tsx:          const newProgress = old + (100 / (DURATION / 50)); // Update every 50ms
components/StoryViewer.tsx:          if (newProgress >= 100) {
components/StoryViewer.tsx:             return 100;
components/StoryViewer.tsx:          }
components/StoryViewer.tsx:          return newProgress;
components/StoryViewer.tsx:        });
components/StoryViewer.tsx:      }
components/StoryViewer.tsx:    }, 50);
components/StoryViewer.tsx:
components/StoryViewer.tsx:    return () => clearInterval(interval);

components/StoryViewer.tsx:
components/StoryViewer.tsx:  // Watch progress to trigger next story

components/StoryViewer.tsx:          if (currentPromo && currentPromo.mediaType === 'image') {
components/StoryViewer.tsx:              nextStory();

components/StoryViewer.tsx:      }

components/StoryViewer.tsx:
components/StoryViewer.tsx:  const handleVideoEnd = () => {
components/StoryViewer.tsx:      nextStory();

components/StoryViewer.tsx:  const nextStory = () => {

components/StoryViewer.tsx:    }

components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:  const handleVerification = async (restoId: string, status: 'verified' | 'rejected') => {
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:      setLoading(true);
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:      try {
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:          const { error } = await supabase.from('restaurants').update({
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:              verification_status: status,
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:              is_verified: status === 'verified',
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:              verification_requested: false // Reset request flag after decision
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:          }).eq('id', restoId);
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:          
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:          if (error) {
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:              console.error("Update error:", error);
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:              toast.error("Erreur de mise à jour : " + error.message);
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:              return;
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:          }
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:          
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:          toast.success(`Restaurant ${status === 'verified' ? 'vérifié' : 'rejeté'} avec succès !`);
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:          
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:          // Send email and platform notification to owner
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:          const { data: resto } = await supabase.from('restaurants').select('name, owner_id').eq('id', restoId).single();
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:          if (resto && resto.owner_id) {
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:              // Platform Notification
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:              await supabase.from('notifications').insert({
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:                  user_id: resto.owner_id,
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:                  restaurant_id: restoId,
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:                  title: status === 'verified' ? "Compte Vérifié !" : "Demande de vérification rejetée",
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:                  message: status === 'verified' 
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:                      ? `Félicitations ! Votre restaurant "${resto.name}" est désormais vérifié.` 
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:                      : `Votre demande de vérification pour "${resto.name}" a été rejetée. Veuillez vérifier vos documents.`,
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:                  type: 'verification_result',

components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:          const a = document.createElement('a');
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:          a.href = url;
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:          a.download = fileName;
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:          document.body.appendChild(a);
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:          a.click();
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:          document.body.removeChild(a);
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:          window.URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:          toast.success("Téléchargement démarré");
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:      } catch (error) {
components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:          console.error("Download error:", error);

components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx:      }

components/MapView.tsx:// On fixe les icônes par défaut de Leaflet qui buggent souvent avec les imports ESM/Webpack
components/MapView.tsx:// Nous utiliserons plutôt des L.divIcon personnalisés pour un look moderne
components/MapView.tsx:
components/MapView.tsx:interface Props {
components/MapView.tsx:  restaurants: Restaurant[];

components/MapView.tsx:// Composant utilitaire pour recentrer la carte
components/MapView.tsx:const RecenterMap = ({ center }: { center: Location }) => {
components/MapView.tsx:  const map = useMap();
components/MapView.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
components/MapView.tsx:    map.flyTo([center.latitude, center.longitude], 15, {
components/MapView.tsx:        animate: true,
components/MapView.tsx:        duration: 1.5
components/MapView.tsx:    });
components/MapView.tsx:  }, [center, map]);
components/MapView.tsx:  return null;
components/MapView.tsx:};
components/MapView.tsx:
components/MapView.tsx:// Composant pour gérer le clic sur la carte
components/MapView.tsx:const MapClickHandler = ({ onLocationChange }: { onLocationChange?: (loc: Location) => void }) => {
components/MapView.tsx:  useMapEvents({
components/MapView.tsx:    click(e) {
components/MapView.tsx:      if (onLocationChange) {
components/MapView.tsx:        onLocationChange({ latitude: e.latlng.lat, longitude: e.latlng.lng });
components/MapView.tsx:      }
components/MapView.tsx:    },
components/MapView.tsx:  });
components/MapView.tsx:  return null;
components/MapView.tsx:};
components/MapView.tsx:
components/MapView.tsx:export const MapView: React.FC<Props> = ({ restaurants, userLocation, onSelect, onLocationChange }) => {

components/MapView.tsx:
components/MapView.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
components/MapView.tsx:    if (userLocation) {
components/MapView.tsx:      setMapCenter(userLocation);
components/MapView.tsx:    }
components/MapView.tsx:  }, [userLocation]);
components/MapView.tsx:
components/MapView.tsx:  // Icône Utilisateur (Point bleu pulsant)

components/MapView.tsx:    className: 'custom-user-icon',
components/MapView.tsx:    html: `
components/MapView.tsx:      <div class="relative flex items-center justify-center w-6 h-6">
components/MapView.tsx:        <span class="animate-ping absolute inline-flex h-full w-full rounded-full bg-blue-400 opacity-75"></span>

components/AuthScreen.tsx:    const handleMessage = (event: MessageEvent) => {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      console.log("📩 [AuthScreen] Message reçu de la popup:", event.origin, event.data?.type);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      // Origin check - be more lenient in development/preview environments
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      const isAllowedOrigin = event.origin === window.location.origin || 
components/AuthScreen.tsx:                             event.origin.includes('.run.app') || 
components/AuthScreen.tsx:                             event.origin.includes('localhost') ||
components/AuthScreen.tsx:                             event.origin.includes('stripe.com'); // Allow stripe for JS SDK
components/AuthScreen.tsx:                             
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      if (event.origin.includes('stripe.com')) return; // Ignore stripe messages for auth
components/AuthScreen.tsx:
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      if (!isAllowedOrigin) {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        console.warn("⚠️ [AuthScreen] Origine non autorisée:", event.origin);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        return;
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      }
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      if (event.data?.type === 'OAUTH_SUCCESS' && event.data.session) {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        setLoading(true);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        supabase.auth.setSession({
components/AuthScreen.tsx:          access_token: event.data.session.access_token,
components/AuthScreen.tsx:          refresh_token: event.data.session.refresh_token
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        });
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        // Remove reload. onAuthStateChange in App.tsx will handle the rest.
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      } else if (event.data?.type === 'OAUTH_ERROR') {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        console.error("❌ [AuthScreen] OAuth Error message received:", event.data.error);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        setError(event.data.error || t('error'));
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        setLoading(false);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      }
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    };
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    window.addEventListener('message', handleMessage);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    // Check for password recovery event
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    const { data: { subscription } } = supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange((event) => {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      if (event === 'PASSWORD_RECOVERY') {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        setIsResettingPassword(true);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      }

components/AuthScreen.tsx:    return () => {

components/AuthScreen.tsx:

components/AuthScreen.tsx:      const RENDER_PROD_URL = "https://dashmeals-rdc.onrender.com";
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      const MOBILE_SCHEME = "com.dashmeals.android://callback";
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      let redirectTo = window.location.origin;
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      if (isNative) {

components/AuthScreen.tsx:      } else if (isRender) {

components/AuthScreen.tsx:      }

components/AuthScreen.tsx:      console.log("🔗 [Auth] URL de retour (redirectTo):", redirectTo);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:

components/AuthScreen.tsx:        provider: provider,
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        options: {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:          redirectTo: redirectTo,
components/AuthScreen.tsx:          // Sur APK, on récupère l'URL pour l'ouvrir dans le navigateur système

components/AuthScreen.tsx:          queryParams: {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            access_type: 'offline',
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            prompt: 'consent',
components/AuthScreen.tsx:          },
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        }
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      });
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      if (error) throw error;
components/AuthScreen.tsx:
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      if (data?.url) {

components/AuthScreen.tsx:            // window.open(url, '_system') est la méthode standard Capacitor pour ouvrir le navigateur externe
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            window.open(data.url, '_system');
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            // On peut arrêter le loading ici car l'utilisateur quitte l'application momentanément

components/AuthScreen.tsx:        } else {

components/AuthScreen.tsx:                    setLoading(false);

components/AuthScreen.tsx:
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    } catch (err: any) {

components/AuthScreen.tsx:      setLoading(false);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    }

components/AuthScreen.tsx:            demoRole === 'delivery' ? 'Livreur Démo (DashBike)' : 'SuperAdmin Démo',

components/AuthScreen.tsx:      city: 'Kinshasa',
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      businessId: demoRole === 'business' ? 'resto-1' : undefined,
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      phoneNumber: '+243812345678',
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      deliveryInfo: demoRole === 'delivery' ? {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        vehicleType: 'moto',
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        isAvailable: true,
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        completedOrders: 15,
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        rating: 4.9
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      } : undefined
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    };
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    onLogin(demoUser);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:  };
components/AuthScreen.tsx:
components/AuthScreen.tsx:  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    e.preventDefault();
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    if (loading) return;
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    console.log(`🚀 [Auth] Tentative de ${isLogin ? 'Connexion' : 'Inscription'} pour: ${email}`);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    setLoading(true);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    setError(null);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    // Timeout de sécurité pour ne pas rester bloqué si Supabase ne répond pas
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    const authTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        if (loading) {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            console.warn("⚠️ [Auth] Timeout détecté durant le processus d'authentification");
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            setError("Le délai d'attente est dépassé. Veuillez réessayer ou vérifier votre connexion.");
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            setLoading(false);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        }
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    }, 15000);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    try {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      if (!isLogin) {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        localStorage.setItem('dashmeals_pending_auth', JSON.stringify({ role, city, phone, name }));
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      }
components/AuthScreen.tsx:
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      if (isLogin) {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        // LOGIN
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        const { error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithPassword({
components/AuthScreen.tsx:          email,
components/AuthScreen.tsx:          password,
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        });
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        if (error) throw error;
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      } else {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        // SIGN UP
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        // 1. Create Auth User
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        const { data: authData, error: authError } = await supabase.auth.signUp({
components/AuthScreen.tsx:          email,
components/AuthScreen.tsx:          password,
components/AuthScreen.tsx:          options: {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            // On sauvegarde aussi les infos dans les métadonnées comme backup
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            data: { 
components/AuthScreen.tsx:                full_name: name, 
components/AuthScreen.tsx:                role: role, 
components/AuthScreen.tsx:                city: city, 
components/AuthScreen.tsx:                phone_number: phone 
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            }, 
components/AuthScreen.tsx:          }
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        });
components/AuthScreen.tsx:
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        if (authError) throw authError;
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        if (authData.user) {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:          // Check if there is an existing profile with the same email to preserve their role
components/AuthScreen.tsx:          const { data: preExistingProfileByEmail } = await supabase
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            .from('profiles')
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            .select('*')
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            .eq('email', email.toLowerCase().trim())
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            .maybeSingle();
components/AuthScreen.tsx:
components/AuthScreen.tsx:          let roleToAssign = role;
components/AuthScreen.tsx:          if (preExistingProfileByEmail) {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            console.log("🔗 Profil pré-existant trouvé par e-mail, préservation du rôle s'il est spécifique, sinon utilisation du nouveau rôle :", preExistingProfileByEmail.role);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            roleToAssign = (preExistingProfileByEmail.role && preExistingProfileByEmail.role !== 'client') 
components/AuthScreen.tsx:              ? preExistingProfileByEmail.role 
components/AuthScreen.tsx:              : role;
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            // Supprimer l'ancien profil temporaire/placeholder
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            await supabase.from('profiles').delete().eq('id', preExistingProfileByEmail.id);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:          }
components/AuthScreen.tsx:
components/AuthScreen.tsx:          // 2. Create Profile in DB using UPSERT to prevent conflicts
components/AuthScreen.tsx:          const { error: profileError } = await supabase.from('profiles').upsert({
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            id: authData.user.id,
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            role: roleToAssign,
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            full_name: name,
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            city: city,
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            phone_number: phone,
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            email: email
components/AuthScreen.tsx:          });
components/AuthScreen.tsx:          
components/AuthScreen.tsx:          if (profileError) {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:             console.warn("Avertissement création profil (Non bloquant):", profileError);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:             // On ne throw PAS d'erreur ici car l'utilisateur est déjà créé dans Auth
components/AuthScreen.tsx:             // et l'application peut fonctionner avec les métadonnées ou le mode offline
components/AuthScreen.tsx:          }
components/AuthScreen.tsx:
components/AuthScreen.tsx:          // 3. If Business, Create Restaurant
components/AuthScreen.tsx:          if (role === 'business') {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            if (!businessName.trim()) throw new Error("Le nom du commerce est requis");
components/AuthScreen.tsx:
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            const { error: restoError } = await supabase.from('restaurants').insert({
components/AuthScreen.tsx:              owner_id: authData.user.id,
components/AuthScreen.tsx:              name: businessName,
components/AuthScreen.tsx:              type: businessType,
components/AuthScreen.tsx:              city: city, 
components/AuthScreen.tsx:              latitude: -4.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02, 
components/AuthScreen.tsx:              longitude: 15.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02,
components/AuthScreen.tsx:              description: `Bienvenue chez ${businessName}`,
components/AuthScreen.tsx:              cover_image: `https://picsum.photos/800/600?random=${Date.now()}`,
components/AuthScreen.tsx:              preparation_time: 30,
components/AuthScreen.tsx:              estimated_delivery_time: 30,
components/AuthScreen.tsx:              currency: 'USD',
components/AuthScreen.tsx:              exchange_rate: 2850,
components/AuthScreen.tsx:              phone_number: phone // Set restaurant phone number to owner's phone initially
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            });
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            if (restoError) {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:                console.warn("Restaurant creation warning:", restoError);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            }
components/AuthScreen.tsx:
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            if (authData.user) {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:              // Forcer la mise à jour des métadonnées auth pour que le rôle
components/AuthScreen.tsx:              // soit disponible immédiatement sans requête DB
components/AuthScreen.tsx:              await supabase.auth.updateUser({
components/AuthScreen.tsx:                data: { role: 'business', full_name: name, city, phone_number: phone }
components/AuthScreen.tsx:              });
components/AuthScreen.tsx:            }
components/AuthScreen.tsx:          }
components/AuthScreen.tsx:          
components/AuthScreen.tsx:          // Si inscription réussie mais pas de session auto (ex: email confirm), on prévient
components/AuthScreen.tsx:          if (!authData.session) {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:              setError("Compte créé ! Veuillez vérifier vos emails pour confirmer votre adresse avant de vous connecter.");
components/AuthScreen.tsx:              setIsLogin(true);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:              setLoading(false);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:              return;
components/AuthScreen.tsx:          }
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        }
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      }
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    } catch (err: any) {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      clearTimeout(authTimeout);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      console.error("Auth Error:", err);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      let message = err.message || "Une erreur est survenue";
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      const lowerMsg = message.toLowerCase();
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      // MAPPING DES ERREURS SUPABASE
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      if (lowerMsg.includes("rate limit") || lowerMsg.includes("too many requests")) {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        message = "Trop de tentatives de connexion. Pour votre sécurité, veuillez patienter quelques minutes avant de réessayer.";
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      } else if (lowerMsg.includes("invalid login credentials")) {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        message = "Identifiants incorrects. Si vous n'avez pas de compte, inscrivez-vous ou utilisez le Mode Démo.";
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      } else if (lowerMsg.includes("email not confirmed")) {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        message = "Votre adresse email n'a pas encore été confirmée. Veuillez vérifier votre boîte de réception (et vos spams).";
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      } else if (lowerMsg.includes("user already registered") || lowerMsg.includes("already exists")) {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        message = "Cette adresse email est déjà associée à un compte. Essayez de vous connecter.";
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      } else if (lowerMsg.includes("password should be at least")) {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        message = "Le mot de passe est trop court. Il doit contenir au moins 6 caractères.";
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      } else if (lowerMsg.includes("captcha verification process failed")) {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        message = "La vérification Captcha a échoué. Veuillez désactiver 'Enable Captcha protection' dans votre dashboard Supabase (Authentication > Settings) pour permettre l'inscription sans Captcha.";
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      } else if (lowerMsg.includes("fetch failed") || lowerMsg.includes("network request failed")) {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        message = "Impossible de contacter le serveur d'authentification (Supabase). Vérifiez votre connexion internet ou la configuration de votre projet Supabase.";
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      }
components/AuthScreen.tsx:
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      setError(message);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    } finally {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      clearTimeout(authTimeout);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      setLoading(false);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    }
components/AuthScreen.tsx:  };
components/AuthScreen.tsx:
components/AuthScreen.tsx:  const handleStaffLogin = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    e.preventDefault();
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    if (loading) return;
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    setLoading(true);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    setError(null);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    try {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      // 1. Find the restaurant by name
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      const { data: restoData, error: restoError } = await supabase
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        .from('restaurants')
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        .select('id, name')
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        .ilike('name', `%${staffRestaurantName}%`)
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        .limit(1)
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        .single();
components/AuthScreen.tsx:
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      if (restoError || !restoData) {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        throw new Error("Établissement non trouvé. Vérifiez le nom.");
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      }
components/AuthScreen.tsx:
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      // 2. Find the staff member in that restaurant
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      const { data: staffData, error: staffError } = await supabase
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        .from('staff_members')
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        .select('*')
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        .eq('restaurant_id', restoData.id)
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        .ilike('name', staffName)
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        .eq('pin_code', staffPin)
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        .single();
components/AuthScreen.tsx:
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      if (staffError || !staffData) {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        throw new Error("Nom ou Code PIN incorrect pour cet établissement.");
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      }
components/AuthScreen.tsx:
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      // 3. Create a virtual user session
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      const staffUser: User = {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        id: staffData.id,
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        name: staffData.name,
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        email: `staff_${staffData.id}@dashmeals.com`,
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        role: 'staff',
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        city: 'Kinshasa', // Default

components/AuthScreen.tsx:        staffRole: staffData.role
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      };
components/AuthScreen.tsx:
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      // Save to local storage for persistence (since it's not a real Supabase Auth session)
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      localStorage.setItem('dashmeals_staff_session', JSON.stringify(staffUser));
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      onLogin(staffUser);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    } catch (err: any) {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      console.error("Staff Login Error:", err);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      setError(err.message || "Erreur de connexion équipe");

components/AuthScreen.tsx:      setLoading(false);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    }
components/AuthScreen.tsx:  };
components/AuthScreen.tsx:
components/AuthScreen.tsx:  const handleForgotPassword = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    e.preventDefault();
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    if (loading) return;
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    if (!email) {

components/AuthScreen.tsx:    setError(null);

components/AuthScreen.tsx:        redirectTo: `${window.location.origin}/reset-password`,
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      });
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      if (error) throw error;
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      setResetEmailSent(true);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    } catch (err: any) {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      console.error("Forgot Password Error:", err);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      setError(err.message || "Erreur lors de l'envoi de l'email de réinitialisation.");
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    } finally {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      setLoading(false);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    }
components/AuthScreen.tsx:  };
components/AuthScreen.tsx:
components/AuthScreen.tsx:  const handleResetPassword = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    e.preventDefault();
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    if (loading) return;
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    if (newPassword.length < 6) {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      setError("Le mot de passe doit contenir au moins 6 caractères.");
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      return;
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    }
components/AuthScreen.tsx:
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    setLoading(true);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    setError(null);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    try {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      const { error } = await supabase.auth.updateUser({
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        password: newPassword,
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      });
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      if (error) throw error;
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      // Sign out to force re-login with new password
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      await supabase.auth.signOut();
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      setIsResettingPassword(false);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      setIsLogin(true);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      setError("Mot de passe réinitialisé avec succès ! Vous pouvez maintenant vous connecter.");
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    } catch (err: any) {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      console.error("Reset Password Error:", err);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      setError(err.message || "Erreur lors de la réinitialisation du mot de passe.");
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    } finally {
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      setLoading(false);
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    }
components/AuthScreen.tsx:  };
components/AuthScreen.tsx:
components/AuthScreen.tsx:
components/AuthScreen.tsx:  return (
components/AuthScreen.tsx:    <div className="min-h-screen bg-slate-50 dark:bg-black flex flex-col items-center overflow-y-auto p-4 pb-80 relative transition-colors duration-500 scroll-smooth">
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      {/* Background Decorative Elements */}
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      <div className="absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-full overflow-hidden pointer-events-none z-0">
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        <div className="absolute -top-[10%] -left-[10%] w-[40%] h-[40%] bg-brand-500/10 rounded-full blur-[120px] animate-pulse"></div>
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        <div className="absolute -bottom-[10%] -right-[10%] w-[40%] h-[40%] bg-blue-500/10 rounded-full blur-[120px] animate-pulse" style={{ animationDelay: '1s' }}></div>
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      </div>
components/AuthScreen.tsx:
components/AuthScreen.tsx:      {onBackToGuest && (
components/AuthScreen.tsx:        <button

components/AuthScreen.tsx:                {!isLogin && !isStaffMode && (

components/AuthScreen.tsx:                    {role === 'client' ? 'Inscrivez-vous pour commander vos plats préférés.' : 
components/AuthScreen.tsx:                     role === 'business' ? 'Inscrivez-vous pour vendre vos produits sur la plateforme.' :

fix_delivery_proposal_v3.sql:-- Script pour corriger l'assignation des livreurs et activer le statut d'acceptation
fix_delivery_proposal_v3.sql:-- À exécuter dans l'éditeur SQL de Supabase
fix_delivery_proposal_v3.sql:
fix_delivery_proposal_v3.sql:-- 1. Ajouter la colonne de statut d'acceptation si elle n'existe pas
fix_delivery_proposal_v3.sql:ALTER TABLE public.orders 
fix_delivery_proposal_v3.sql:ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS delivery_acceptance_status text 
fix_delivery_proposal_v3.sql:CHECK (delivery_acceptance_status IN ('pending', 'accepted', 'rejected')) 
fix_delivery_proposal_v3.sql:DEFAULT 'pending';
fix_delivery_proposal_v3.sql:
fix_delivery_proposal_v3.sql:-- 2. S'assurer que les colonnes de livreur existent
fix_delivery_proposal_v3.sql:ALTER TABLE public.orders 
fix_delivery_proposal_v3.sql:ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS delivery_person_id uuid REFERENCES public.profiles(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
fix_delivery_proposal_v3.sql:ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS delivery_lat double precision,
fix_delivery_proposal_v3.sql:ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS delivery_lng double precision;
fix_delivery_proposal_v3.sql:
fix_delivery_proposal_v3.sql:-- 3. Mettre à jour les types de notifications pour inclure les propositions de livraison
fix_delivery_proposal_v3.sql:-- (Si une contrainte sur le type existe, on l'ajuste, sinon les inserts fonctionneront)
fix_delivery_proposal_v3.sql:
fix_delivery_proposal_v3.sql:-- 4. Notifier PostgREST pour recharger le schéma
fix_delivery_proposal_v3.sql:NOTIFY pgrst, 'reload schema';
DEFINITIVE_DATABASE_FIX.sql:-- REPARATION DEFINITIVE DE LA BASE DE DONNEES

utils/format.ts:import { EXCHANGE_RATE } from '../constants';
utils/format.ts:
utils/format.ts:/**
utils/format.ts: * Formate un prix en affichant à la fois USD et CDF
utils/format.ts: * @param amount Le montant
utils/format.ts: * @param fromCurrency La devise d'origine ('USD' ou 'CDF')
utils/format.ts: * @param rate Taux de change optionnel (USD -> CDF)
utils/format.ts: * @param displayMode Mode d'affichage ('dual', 'usd', 'cdf')
utils/format.ts: * @returns Une chaîne formatée
utils/format.ts: */
utils/format.ts:export const formatDualPrice = (amount: number, fromCurrency: 'USD' | 'CDF' = 'USD', rate?: number, displayMode: 'dual' | 'usd' | 'cdf' = 'dual'): string => {
utils/format.ts:  const activeRate = rate || EXCHANGE_RATE;
utils/format.ts:  
utils/format.ts:  if (displayMode === 'usd') {
utils/format.ts:    const usd = fromCurrency === 'USD' ? amount : amount / activeRate;
utils/format.ts:    return `$${usd.toFixed(2)}`;
utils/format.ts:  }
utils/format.ts:  
utils/format.ts:  if (displayMode === 'cdf') {
utils/format.ts:    const cdf = fromCurrency === 'CDF' ? amount : amount * activeRate;
utils/format.ts:    return `${cdf.toLocaleString('fr-FR').replace(/\s/g, '.')} FC`;
utils/format.ts:  }
utils/format.ts:
utils/format.ts:  if (fromCurrency === 'USD') {
utils/format.ts:    const usd = amount;
utils/format.ts:    const cdf = amount * activeRate;
utils/format.ts:    return `$${usd.toFixed(2)} / ${cdf.toLocaleString('fr-FR').replace(/\s/g, '.')} FC`;
utils/format.ts:  } else {
utils/format.ts:    const cdf = amount;
utils/format.ts:    const usd = amount / activeRate;
utils/format.ts:    return `${cdf.toLocaleString('fr-FR').replace(/\s/g, '.')} FC / $${usd.toFixed(2)}`;
utils/format.ts:  }
utils/format.ts:};
utils/format.ts:
utils/format.ts:/**
utils/format.ts: * Formate un prix simplement (une seule devise)
utils/format.ts: */
utils/format.ts:export const formatPrice = (amount: number, currency: 'USD' | 'CDF' = 'USD'): string => {
utils/format.ts:  if (currency === 'CDF') {
utils/format.ts:    return `${amount.toLocaleString('fr-FR').replace(/\s/g, '.')} FC`;
utils/format.ts:  }
utils/format.ts:  return `$${amount.toFixed(2)}`;
utils/format.ts:};

utils/geo.ts:// Speed constants in km/h
utils/geo.ts:const SPEED_WALKING = 5;
utils/geo.ts:const SPEED_MOTO = 30;
utils/geo.ts:
utils/geo.ts:function deg2rad(deg: number): number {
utils/geo.ts:  return deg * (Math.PI / 180);
utils/geo.ts:}
utils/geo.ts:
utils/geo.ts:/**
utils/geo.ts: * Calculates distance between two coordinates in Kilometers using Haversine formula
utils/geo.ts: */
utils/geo.ts:export function getDistanceFromLatLonInKm(lat1: number, lon1: number, lat2: number, lon2: number): number {
utils/geo.ts:  const R = 6371; // Radius of the earth in km
utils/geo.ts:  const dLat = deg2rad(lat2 - lat1);
utils/geo.ts:  const dLon = deg2rad(lon2 - lon1);
utils/geo.ts:  const a =
utils/geo.ts:    Math.sin(dLat / 2) * Math.sin(dLat / 2) +
utils/geo.ts:    Math.cos(deg2rad(lat1)) * Math.cos(deg2rad(lat2)) *
utils/geo.ts:    Math.sin(dLon / 2) * Math.sin(dLon / 2);
utils/geo.ts:  const c = 2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1 - a));
utils/geo.ts:  const d = R * c; // Distance in km
utils/geo.ts:  return d;
utils/geo.ts:}
utils/geo.ts:
utils/geo.ts:/**
utils/geo.ts: * Returns estimated time in minutes
utils/geo.ts: */
utils/geo.ts:export function calculateTime(distanceKm: number, speedKmh: number): number {
utils/geo.ts:  const timeHours = distanceKm / speedKmh;
utils/geo.ts:  return Math.ceil(timeHours * 60);
utils/geo.ts:}
utils/geo.ts:
utils/geo.ts:export function formatDistance(km: number | undefined | null): string {
utils/geo.ts:  if (km === undefined || km === null) return '--';
utils/geo.ts:  if (km < 1) {
utils/geo.ts:    return `${Math.round(km * 1000)}m`;
utils/geo.ts:  }
utils/geo.ts:  return `${km.toFixed(1)} km`;
utils/geo.ts:}
utils/geo.ts:
utils/geo.ts:export function formatTime(minutes: number | undefined | null): string {
utils/geo.ts:  if (minutes === undefined || minutes === null) return '--';
utils/geo.ts:  if (minutes >= 60) {
utils/geo.ts:    const h = Math.floor(minutes / 60);
utils/geo.ts:    const m = minutes % 60;
utils/geo.ts:    return `${h}h ${m}min`;
utils/geo.ts:  }
utils/geo.ts:  return `${minutes} min`;
utils/geo.ts:}
utils/presence.ts:/**
utils/presence.ts: * Utilitaires pour gérer l'état de présence (style Facebook) des utilisateurs (Clients, Restaurants, Livreurs).
utils/presence.ts: */
utils/presence.ts:
utils/presence.ts:/**
utils/presence.ts: * Détermine si un utilisateur est en ligne en se basant sur son "last_seen" timestamp.
utils/presence.ts: * Un utilisateur est considéré comme "en ligne" s'il a été actif durant les 60 dernières secondes.
utils/presence.ts: */
utils/presence.ts:export const isUserOnline = (lastSeen: string | Date | null | undefined): boolean => {
utils/presence.ts:  if (!lastSeen) return false;
utils/presence.ts:  
utils/presence.ts:  try {
utils/presence.ts:    const lastSeenDate = new Date(lastSeen);
utils/presence.ts:    const now = new Date();
utils/presence.ts:    const diffMs = now.getTime() - lastSeenDate.getTime();
utils/presence.ts:    
utils/presence.ts:    // Si la différence est inférieure à 60 secondes (60 000 ms), on considère comme en ligne.
utils/presence.ts:    // Les timestamps futurs (diffMs < 0) signifient que l'utilisateur est en ligne mais son horloge (ou celle du serveur) est en avance.
utils/presence.ts:    return diffMs <= 60000;
utils/presence.ts:  } catch (err) {
utils/presence.ts:    console.error("Error parsing lastSeen date:", err);
utils/presence.ts:    return false;
utils/presence.ts:  }
utils/presence.ts:};
utils/presence.ts:
utils/presence.ts:/**
utils/presence.ts: * Formate la date de dernière connexion de l'utilisateur de manière conviviale.
utils/presence.ts: */
utils/presence.ts:export const formatLastSeen = (lastSeen: string | Date | null | undefined): string => {
utils/presence.ts:  if (!lastSeen) return "Hors ligne";
utils/presence.ts:  
utils/presence.ts:  if (isUserOnline(lastSeen)) {
utils/presence.ts:    return "En ligne";
utils/presence.ts:  }
utils/presence.ts:  
utils/presence.ts:  try {
utils/presence.ts:    const lastSeenDate = new Date(lastSeen);
utils/presence.ts:    const now = new Date();
utils/presence.ts:    const diffMs = Math.max(0, now.getTime() - lastSeenDate.getTime()); // clamp to 0 minimum to avoid negative
utils/presence.ts:    
utils/presence.ts:    const diffSec = Math.floor(diffMs / 1000);
utils/presence.ts:    const diffMin = Math.floor(diffSec / 60);
utils/presence.ts:    const diffHr = Math.floor(diffMin / 60);
utils/presence.ts:    const diffDays = Math.floor(diffHr / 24);
utils/presence.ts:    
utils/presence.ts:    if (diffMin < 1) {
utils/presence.ts:      return "En ligne il y a moins d'une minute";
utils/presence.ts:    }
utils/presence.ts:    if (diffMin < 60) {
utils/presence.ts:      return `En ligne il y a ${diffMin} min`;
utils/presence.ts:    }
utils/presence.ts:    if (diffHr < 24) {
utils/presence.ts:      return `En ligne il y a ${diffHr} h`;
utils/presence.ts:    }
utils/presence.ts:    if (diffDays === 1) {
utils/presence.ts:      return "En ligne hier";
utils/presence.ts:    }
utils/presence.ts:    if (diffDays < 7) {
utils/presence.ts:      return `En ligne il y a ${diffDays} j`;
utils/presence.ts:    }
utils/presence.ts:    
utils/presence.ts:    return `Dernière connexion : ${lastSeenDate.toLocaleDateString('fr-FR', {
utils/presence.ts:      day: 'numeric',
utils/presence.ts:      month: 'short',
utils/presence.ts:      hour: '2-digit',
utils/presence.ts:      minute: '2-digit'
utils/presence.ts:    })}`;
utils/presence.ts:  } catch (err) {
utils/presence.ts:    return "Hors ligne";
utils/presence.ts:  }
utils/presence.ts:};
