utils/notifications.ts:import { toast } from 'sonner';
utils/notifications.ts:import { Capacitor } from '@capacitor/core';
utils/notifications.ts:import { PushNotifications, Token, PushNotificationSchema, ActionPerformed } from '@capacitor/push-notifications';
utils/notifications.ts:import { supabase } from '../lib/supabase';
utils/notifications.ts:
utils/notifications.ts:/**
utils/notifications.ts: * Demande de permission pour les notifications (adapté pour Web et Capacitor Native)
utils/notifications.ts: */
utils/notifications.ts:export async function requestNotificationPermission(): Promise<boolean> {
utils/notifications.ts:  // 1. Version Native Capacitor (iOS/Android)
utils/notifications.ts:  if (Capacitor.isNativePlatform()) {
utils/notifications.ts:    try {
utils/notifications.ts:      let permStatus = await PushNotifications.checkPermissions();
utils/notifications.ts:      
utils/notifications.ts:      if (permStatus.receive === 'prompt') {
utils/notifications.ts:        permStatus = await PushNotifications.requestPermissions();
utils/notifications.ts:      }
utils/notifications.ts:
utils/notifications.ts:      if (permStatus.receive === 'granted') {
utils/notifications.ts:        await PushNotifications.register();
utils/notifications.ts:        return true;
utils/notifications.ts:      } else {
utils/notifications.ts:        console.warn("🔔 [Push Native] Permission refusée.");
utils/notifications.ts:        toast.error("L'autorisation de notifications a été refusée côté système.");
utils/notifications.ts:        return false;
utils/notifications.ts:      }
utils/notifications.ts:    } catch (e) {
utils/notifications.ts:      console.error("🔔 [Push Native] Erreur de permission native:", e);
utils/notifications.ts:      return false;
utils/notifications.ts:    }
utils/notifications.ts:  }
utils/notifications.ts:
utils/notifications.ts:  // 2. Version Web Standard
utils/notifications.ts:  if (!('Notification' in window)) {
utils/notifications.ts:    console.warn("Ce navigateur ne supporte pas les notifications");
utils/notifications.ts:    toast.error("Votre navigateur ne supporte pas les notifications");
utils/notifications.ts:    return false;
utils/notifications.ts:  }
utils/notifications.ts:
utils/notifications.ts:  if (Notification.permission === 'granted') {
utils/notifications.ts:    return true;
utils/notifications.ts:  }
utils/notifications.ts:
utils/notifications.ts:  if (Notification.permission === 'denied') {
utils/notifications.ts:    const isIOS = /iPad|iPhone|iPod/.test(navigator.userAgent) && !(window as any).MSStream;
utils/notifications.ts:    const isStandalone = !!window.matchMedia('(display-mode: standalone)').matches || !!(window.navigator as any).standalone;
utils/notifications.ts:    
utils/notifications.ts:    if (isIOS && !isStandalone) {
utils/notifications.ts:      toast.error(
utils/notifications.ts:        "Sur iOS, ajoutez l'application à votre écran d'accueil pour activer les notifications.",
utils/notifications.ts:        { duration: 8000 }
utils/notifications.ts:      );
utils/notifications.ts:    } else {
utils/notifications.ts:      toast.error(
utils/notifications.ts:        "Notifications bloquées. Activez-les dans les paramètres du site (icône cadenas).",
utils/notifications.ts:        { duration: 8000 }
utils/notifications.ts:      );
utils/notifications.ts:    }
utils/notifications.ts:    return false;
utils/notifications.ts:  }
utils/notifications.ts:
utils/notifications.ts:  try {
utils/notifications.ts:    if (window.self !== window.top) {
utils/notifications.ts:      console.warn("⚠️ [Notif Web] Iframe détecté.");
utils/notifications.ts:    }
utils/notifications.ts:
utils/notifications.ts:    const permission = await Notification.requestPermission();
utils/notifications.ts:    if (permission === 'granted') {
utils/notifications.ts:      toast.success("Notifications activées !");
utils/notifications.ts:      return true;
utils/notifications.ts:    } else {
utils/notifications.ts:      toast.error("Notifications bloquées par le système ou l'utilisateur.");
utils/notifications.ts:      return false;
utils/notifications.ts:    }
utils/notifications.ts:  } catch (e) {
utils/notifications.ts:    console.error("Erreur lors de la demande de permission web:", e);
utils/notifications.ts:    return false;
utils/notifications.ts:  }
utils/notifications.ts:}

utils/notifications.ts:/**
utils/notifications.ts: * Envoi d'une notification push locale (Web ou Capacitor)
utils/notifications.ts: */
utils/notifications.ts:export const sendPushNotification = (title: string, options?: NotificationOptions) => {
utils/notifications.ts:  // 1. Version Native Capacitor
utils/notifications.ts:  if (Capacitor.isNativePlatform()) {
utils/notifications.ts:    toast(title, {
utils/notifications.ts:      description: options?.body || "",
utils/notifications.ts:      duration: 5000,
utils/notifications.ts:    });
utils/notifications.ts:    return;
utils/notifications.ts:  }
utils/notifications.ts:
utils/notifications.ts:  // 2. Version Web
utils/notifications.ts:  if (!('Notification' in window)) return;
utils/notifications.ts:  
utils/notifications.ts:  if (Notification.permission === 'granted') {
utils/notifications.ts:    try {
utils/notifications.ts:      navigator.serviceWorker.ready.then(registration => {
utils/notifications.ts:        (registration as any).showNotification(title, {
utils/notifications.ts:          icon: '/logo.png',
utils/notifications.ts:          vibrate: [200, 100, 200],
utils/notifications.ts:          ...options
utils/notifications.ts:        });
utils/notifications.ts:      }).catch(() => {
utils/notifications.ts:        new Notification(title, {
utils/notifications.ts:          icon: '/logo.png',
utils/notifications.ts:          ...options
utils/notifications.ts:        });
utils/notifications.ts:      });
utils/notifications.ts:    } catch (e) {
utils/notifications.ts:      new Notification(title, {
utils/notifications.ts:        icon: '/logo.png',
utils/notifications.ts:        ...options
utils/notifications.ts:      });
utils/notifications.ts:    }
utils/notifications.ts:  }
utils/notifications.ts:};

utils/notifications.ts:/**
utils/notifications.ts: * Initialise l'enregistrement automatique des notifications natives et lie le FCM aux profils Supabase
utils/notifications.ts: */
utils/notifications.ts:export async function initializeCapacitorPush(userId: string): Promise<void> {
utils/notifications.ts:  if (!Capacitor.isNativePlatform()) {
utils/notifications.ts:    return;
utils/notifications.ts:  }
utils/notifications.ts:
utils/notifications.ts:  if (!userId || userId.startsWith('mock-')) {
utils/notifications.ts:    return;
utils/notifications.ts:  }
utils/notifications.ts:
utils/notifications.ts:  try {
utils/notifications.ts:    console.log("🔔 [Push Native] Démarrage de la configuration native pour l'utilisateur:", userId);
utils/notifications.ts:
utils/notifications.ts:    // Vérifier et s'assurer que les permissions sont valides
utils/notifications.ts:    let permStatus = await PushNotifications.checkPermissions();
utils/notifications.ts:    if (permStatus.receive === 'prompt') {
utils/notifications.ts:      permStatus = await PushNotifications.requestPermissions();
utils/notifications.ts:    }
utils/notifications.ts:
utils/notifications.ts:    if (permStatus.receive !== 'granted') {
utils/notifications.ts:      console.warn("🔔 [Push Native] Permission non accordée :", permStatus.receive);
utils/notifications.ts:      return;
utils/notifications.ts:    }
utils/notifications.ts:
utils/notifications.ts:    // Nettoyer les écouteurs précédents pour éviter des doublons lors du Hot Reload ou de reconnexions
utils/notifications.ts:    await PushNotifications.removeAllListeners();
utils/notifications.ts:
utils/notifications.ts:    // 1. Enregistrement FCM réussi
utils/notifications.ts:    await PushNotifications.addListener('registration', async (token: Token) => {
utils/notifications.ts:      console.log('🔑 [Push Native] Token FCM généré avec succès:', token.value);
utils/notifications.ts:      localStorage.setItem('fcm_token_native', token.value);
utils/notifications.ts:
utils/notifications.ts:      // Synchroniser le jeton directement avec le champ settings du profil utilisateur
utils/notifications.ts:      try {
utils/notifications.ts:        const { data: profile, error: fetchErr } = await supabase
utils/notifications.ts:          .from('profiles')
utils/notifications.ts:          .select('settings')
utils/notifications.ts:          .eq('id', userId)
utils/notifications.ts:          .maybeSingle();
utils/notifications.ts:
utils/notifications.ts:        if (!fetchErr) {
utils/notifications.ts:          const currentSettings = profile?.settings || {};
utils/notifications.ts:          const updatedSettings = {
utils/notifications.ts:            ...currentSettings,
utils/notifications.ts:            fcmToken: token.value,
utils/notifications.ts:            lastRegisteredPlatform: Capacitor.getPlatform(),
utils/notifications.ts:            lastRegisteredAt: new Date().toISOString()
utils/notifications.ts:          };
utils/notifications.ts:
utils/notifications.ts:          const { error: updateErr } = await supabase
utils/notifications.ts:            .from('profiles')
utils/notifications.ts:            .update({ settings: updatedSettings })
utils/notifications.ts:            .eq('id', userId);
utils/notifications.ts:
utils/notifications.ts:          if (updateErr) {
utils/notifications.ts:            console.error('❌ [Push Native] Échec d\'enregistrement DB du token FCM:', updateErr.message);
utils/notifications.ts:          } else {
utils/notifications.ts:            console.log('✅ [Push Native] Jeton FCM enregistré avec succès dans Supabase profile.settings !');
utils/notifications.ts:          }
utils/notifications.ts:        }
utils/notifications.ts:      } catch (dbErr) {
utils/notifications.ts:        console.error('❌ [Push Native] Exception de sauvegarde DB:', dbErr);
utils/notifications.ts:      }
utils/notifications.ts:    });
utils/notifications.ts:
utils/notifications.ts:    // 2. Erreur d'enregistrement
utils/notifications.ts:    await PushNotifications.addListener('registrationError', (error: any) => {
utils/notifications.ts:      console.error('❌ [Push Native] Erreur d\'enregistrement système push:', JSON.stringify(error));
utils/notifications.ts:    });
utils/notifications.ts:
utils/notifications.ts:    // 3. Réception de notifications au premier plan (Foreground)
utils/notifications.ts:    await PushNotifications.addListener('pushNotificationReceived', (notification: PushNotificationSchema) => {
utils/notifications.ts:      console.log('🔔 [Push Native] Notification reçue au premier plan:', notification);
utils/notifications.ts:      
utils/notifications.ts:      // Notification visuelle interne très propre respectant la charte orange/blanc, compatible pur .ts
utils/notifications.ts:      toast(notification.title || "DashMeals", {
utils/notifications.ts:        description: notification.body || "",
utils/notifications.ts:        duration: 8000,
utils/notifications.ts:        style: {
utils/notifications.ts:          border: '2px solid #f97316',
utils/notifications.ts:          borderRadius: '16px',
utils/notifications.ts:          color: '#ea580c',
utils/notifications.ts:          background: '#ffffff',
utils/notifications.ts:        },
utils/notifications.ts:        icon: '🔔',
utils/notifications.ts:        action: notification.data && notification.data.orderId ? {
utils/notifications.ts:          label: "Voir",
utils/notifications.ts:          onClick: () => {
utils/notifications.ts:            const event = new CustomEvent('navigate_to_order', { detail: { orderId: notification.data.orderId } });
utils/notifications.ts:            window.dispatchEvent(event);
utils/notifications.ts:          }
utils/notifications.ts:        } : undefined
utils/notifications.ts:      });
utils/notifications.ts:    });
utils/notifications.ts:
utils/notifications.ts:    // 4. Clic de l'utilisateur sur la notification (Arrière-plan / Fermé)
utils/notifications.ts:    await PushNotifications.addListener('pushNotificationActionPerformed', (action: ActionPerformed) => {
utils/notifications.ts:      console.log('🔔 [Push Native] Action effectuée sur la notification:', action);
utils/notifications.ts:      const data = action.notification.data;
utils/notifications.ts:      
utils/notifications.ts:      if (data && data.orderId) {
utils/notifications.ts:        // Déclencher un événement global pour que le root effectue la navigation vers la commande
utils/notifications.ts:        setTimeout(() => {
utils/notifications.ts:          const event = new CustomEvent('navigate_to_order', { detail: { orderId: data.orderId } });
utils/notifications.ts:          window.dispatchEvent(event);
utils/notifications.ts:        }, 800);
utils/notifications.ts:      }
utils/notifications.ts:    });
utils/notifications.ts:
utils/notifications.ts:    // Envoyer la demande d'enregistrement final à Capacitor
utils/notifications.ts:    await PushNotifications.register();
utils/notifications.ts:
utils/notifications.ts:  } catch (error) {
utils/notifications.ts:    console.error("❌ [Push Native] Erreur lors de l'initialisation push:", error);
utils/notifications.ts:  }
utils/notifications.ts:}
utils/fetch.ts:/**
utils/fetch.ts: * Utility for fetching with automatic retries and exponential backoff.
utils/fetch.ts: * Especially useful for users on unstable mobile networks.
utils/fetch.ts: */
utils/fetch.ts:export async function fetchWithRetry(
utils/fetch.ts:  input: RequestInfo | URL, 
utils/fetch.ts:  init?: RequestInit, 
utils/fetch.ts:  retries = 3, 
utils/fetch.ts:  backoff = 1000
utils/fetch.ts:): Promise<Response> {
utils/fetch.ts:  const url = typeof input === 'string' ? input : (input instanceof URL ? input.toString() : input.url);
utils/fetch.ts:  
utils/fetch.ts:  try {
utils/fetch.ts:    const response = await fetch(input, init);
utils/fetch.ts:    
utils/fetch.ts:    // We only retry on 5xx errors or network failures
utils/fetch.ts:    if (!response.ok && response.status >= 500 && retries > 0) {
utils/fetch.ts:      console.warn(`Fetch to ${url} failed with status ${response.status}. Retrying in ${backoff}ms...`);
utils/fetch.ts:      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, backoff));
utils/fetch.ts:      return fetchWithRetry(input, init, retries - 1, backoff * 2);
utils/fetch.ts:    }
utils/fetch.ts:    
utils/fetch.ts:    return response;
utils/fetch.ts:  } catch (error: any) {
utils/fetch.ts:    // Check if it's a "Failed to fetch" (network error)
utils/fetch.ts:    if (retries > 0 && (error.message?.includes('Failed to fetch') || error.message?.includes('network'))) {
utils/fetch.ts:      console.warn(`Network error fetching ${url}. Retrying in ${backoff}ms...`, error);
utils/fetch.ts:      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, backoff));
utils/fetch.ts:      return fetchWithRetry(input, init, retries - 1, backoff * 2);
utils/fetch.ts:    }
utils/fetch.ts:    throw error;
utils/fetch.ts:  }
utils/fetch.ts:}
supabase/schema.sql:-- Create MESSAGES table
supabase/schema.sql:CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.messages (
supabase/schema.sql:    id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY,
supabase/schema.sql:    order_id UUID REFERENCES public.orders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE NOT NULL,
supabase/schema.sql:    sender_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id) NOT NULL,
supabase/schema.sql:    content TEXT NOT NULL,
supabase/schema.sql:    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
supabase/schema.sql:    is_read BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE
supabase/schema.sql:);
supabase/schema.sql:
supabase/schema.sql:-- Enable Row Level Security
supabase/schema.sql:ALTER TABLE public.messages ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
supabase/schema.sql:
supabase/schema.sql:-- Policy: Users can view messages for their own orders
supabase/schema.sql:CREATE POLICY "Users can view messages for their orders" 
supabase/schema.sql:ON public.messages FOR SELECT 
supabase/schema.sql:USING (
supabase/schema.sql:    auth.uid() IN (
supabase/schema.sql:        SELECT user_id FROM public.orders WHERE id = messages.order_id
supabase/schema.sql:    )
supabase/schema.sql:    OR 
supabase/schema.sql:    auth.uid() IN (
supabase/schema.sql:        SELECT owner_id FROM public.restaurants 
supabase/schema.sql:        JOIN public.orders ON orders.restaurant_id = restaurants.id 
supabase/schema.sql:        WHERE orders.id = messages.order_id
supabase/schema.sql:    )
supabase/schema.sql:);
supabase/schema.sql:
supabase/schema.sql:-- Policy: Users can insert messages for their own orders
supabase/schema.sql:CREATE POLICY "Users can insert messages for their orders" 
supabase/schema.sql:ON public.messages FOR INSERT 
supabase/schema.sql:WITH CHECK (
supabase/schema.sql:    auth.uid() = sender_id
supabase/schema.sql:    AND (
supabase/schema.sql:        auth.uid() IN (
supabase/schema.sql:            SELECT user_id FROM public.orders WHERE id = order_id
supabase/schema.sql:        )
supabase/schema.sql:        OR 
supabase/schema.sql:        auth.uid() IN (
supabase/schema.sql:            SELECT owner_id FROM public.restaurants 
supabase/schema.sql:            JOIN public.orders ON orders.restaurant_id = restaurants.id 
supabase/schema.sql:            WHERE orders.id = order_id
supabase/schema.sql:        )
supabase/schema.sql:    )
supabase/schema.sql:);
supabase/schema.sql:
supabase/schema.sql:-- Policy: Users can update (mark as read) messages for their orders
supabase/schema.sql:CREATE POLICY "Users can update messages for their orders" 
supabase/schema.sql:ON public.messages FOR UPDATE 
supabase/schema.sql:USING (
supabase/schema.sql:    auth.uid() IN (
supabase/schema.sql:        SELECT user_id FROM public.orders WHERE id = messages.order_id
supabase/schema.sql:    )
supabase/schema.sql:    OR 
supabase/schema.sql:    auth.uid() IN (
supabase/schema.sql:        SELECT owner_id FROM public.restaurants 
supabase/schema.sql:        JOIN public.orders ON orders.restaurant_id = restaurants.id 
supabase/schema.sql:        WHERE orders.id = messages.order_id
supabase/schema.sql:    )
supabase/schema.sql:);
supabase/schema.sql:
supabase/schema.sql:-- Realtime subscription
supabase/schema.sql:ALTER PUBLICATION supabase_realtime ADD TABLE public.messages;

lib/gemini.ts:// AI Services for DashMeals
lib/gemini.ts:// Client-side calls are routed through our secure server proxy at /api/gemini 
lib/gemini.ts:// to avoid exposing our GEMINI_API_KEY to the client bundle.
lib/gemini.ts:
lib/gemini.ts:// 1. Assistant Vocal Multi-Rôles
lib/gemini.ts:export const processVoiceCommand = async (command: string, role: "business" | "delivery" | "user" = "delivery") => {
lib/gemini.ts:  try {
lib/gemini.ts:    const response = await fetch('/api/gemini', {
lib/gemini.ts:      method: 'POST',
lib/gemini.ts:      headers: {
lib/gemini.ts:        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
lib/gemini.ts:      },
lib/gemini.ts:      body: JSON.stringify({
lib/gemini.ts:        action: 'processVoiceCommand',
lib/gemini.ts:        payload: { command, role }
lib/gemini.ts:      })
lib/gemini.ts:    });
lib/gemini.ts:
lib/gemini.ts:    if (!response.ok) {
lib/gemini.ts:      throw new Error(`Server returned ${response.status}`);
lib/gemini.ts:    }
lib/gemini.ts:
lib/gemini.ts:    return await response.json();
lib/gemini.ts:  } catch (e) {
lib/gemini.ts:    console.error("AI Error:", e);
lib/gemini.ts:    return { action: "unknown" };
lib/gemini.ts:  }
lib/gemini.ts:};

lib/gemini.ts:export const getSmartSupportResponse = async (userMessage: string, context: any) => {
lib/gemini.ts:  try {
lib/gemini.ts:    const response = await fetch('/api/gemini', {
lib/gemini.ts:      method: 'POST',
lib/gemini.ts:      headers: {
lib/gemini.ts:        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
lib/gemini.ts:      },
lib/gemini.ts:      body: JSON.stringify({
lib/gemini.ts:        action: 'getSmartSupportResponse',
lib/gemini.ts:        payload: { userMessage, context }
lib/gemini.ts:      })
lib/gemini.ts:    });
lib/gemini.ts:
lib/gemini.ts:    if (!response.ok) {
lib/gemini.ts:      throw new Error(`Server returned ${response.status}`);
lib/gemini.ts:    }
lib/gemini.ts:
lib/gemini.ts:    const data = await response.json();
lib/gemini.ts:    return data.text || "Désolé, je ne peux pas répondre pour le moment.";
lib/gemini.ts:  } catch (e) {
lib/gemini.ts:    console.error("AI Error:", e);
lib/gemini.ts:    return "Le service de support est temporairement indisponible.";
lib/gemini.ts:  }

lib/email.ts:import { fetchWithRetry } from '../utils/fetch';
lib/email.ts:import { supabase } from './supabase';
lib/email.ts:
lib/email.ts:export const sendEmail = async ({ to, subject, html, from }: { to: string | string[], subject: string, html: string, from?: string }) => {
lib/email.ts:  try {
lib/email.ts:    const sessionRes = await supabase.auth.getSession();
lib/email.ts:    const token = sessionRes.data?.session?.access_token || '';
lib/email.ts:
lib/email.ts:    const response = await fetchWithRetry('/api/email/send', {
lib/email.ts:      method: 'POST',
lib/email.ts:      headers: {
lib/email.ts:        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
lib/email.ts:        ...(token ? { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` } : {})
lib/email.ts:      },
lib/email.ts:      body: JSON.stringify({ to, subject, html, from }),
lib/email.ts:    });
lib/email.ts:
lib/email.ts:    if (!response.ok) {
lib/email.ts:      let errorMessage = 'Failed to send email';
lib/email.ts:      try {
lib/email.ts:        const errorData = await response.json();
lib/email.ts:        errorMessage = typeof errorData.error === 'object' 
lib/email.ts:          ? (errorData.error.message || JSON.stringify(errorData.error)) 
lib/email.ts:          : (errorData.error || errorMessage);
lib/email.ts:      } catch (e) {
lib/email.ts:        errorMessage = `Email server error: ${response.status} ${response.statusText}`;
lib/email.ts:      }
lib/email.ts:      throw new Error(errorMessage);
lib/email.ts:    }
lib/email.ts:
lib/email.ts:    try {
lib/email.ts:      return await response.json();
lib/email.ts:    } catch (e) {
lib/email.ts:      return { success: true }; // Fallback if server returned 200 but no JSON
lib/email.ts:    }
lib/email.ts:  } catch (error: any) {
lib/email.ts:    console.error('Email sending failed:', error.message || error);
lib/email.ts:    // We don't want to break the app flow if email fails
lib/email.ts:    return null;
lib/email.ts:  }
lib/email.ts:};
lib/email.ts:
lib/email.ts:export const sendOrderConfirmationEmail = async (order: any, userEmail: string) => {
lib/email.ts:  const itemsHtml = order.items.map((item: any) => `
lib/email.ts:    <li>${item.quantity}x ${item.name} - $${(item.price * item.quantity).toFixed(2)}</li>
lib/email.ts:  `).join('');
lib/email.ts:
lib/email.ts:  const html = `
lib/email.ts:    <div style="font-family: sans-serif; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto;">
lib/email.ts:      <h1 style="color: #ea580c;">Merci pour votre commande !</h1>
lib/email.ts:      <p>Votre commande <strong>#${order.id.slice(0, 8)}</strong> a été reçue et est en cours de traitement.</p>
lib/email.ts:      
lib/email.ts:      <h3>Détails de la commande :</h3>
lib/email.ts:      <ul>
lib/email.ts:        ${itemsHtml}
lib/email.ts:      </ul>
lib/email.ts:      
lib/email.ts:      <p><strong>Total : $${order.totalAmount.toFixed(2)}</strong></p>
lib/email.ts:      
lib/email.ts:      <p>Vous recevrez une notification dès que votre commande sera prête.</p>
lib/email.ts:      
lib/email.ts:      <hr style="border: none; border-top: 1px solid #eee; margin: 20px 0;" />
lib/email.ts:      <p style="font-size: 12px; color: #666;">DashMeals - Votre service de livraison préféré.</p>
lib/email.ts:    </div>
lib/email.ts:  `;
lib/email.ts:
lib/email.ts:  return sendEmail({
lib/email.ts:    to: userEmail,
lib/email.ts:    subject: `Confirmation de votre commande DashMeals #${order.id.slice(0, 8)}`,
lib/email.ts:    html
lib/email.ts:  });

fix_reviews_table.sql:-- Fix reviews table and add order_id and reply columns
fix_reviews_table.sql:DO $$ 
fix_reviews_table.sql:BEGIN 
fix_reviews_table.sql:    -- Add order_id if it doesn't exist
fix_reviews_table.sql:    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='reviews' AND column_name='order_id') THEN
fix_reviews_table.sql:        ALTER TABLE public.reviews ADD COLUMN order_id uuid REFERENCES public.orders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;
fix_reviews_table.sql:    END IF;
fix_reviews_table.sql:
fix_reviews_table.sql:    -- Add reply if it doesn't exist
fix_reviews_table.sql:    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='reviews' AND column_name='reply') THEN
fix_reviews_table.sql:        ALTER TABLE public.reviews ADD COLUMN reply text;
fix_reviews_table.sql:    END IF;
fix_reviews_table.sql:
fix_reviews_table.sql:    -- Add reply_at if it doesn't exist
fix_reviews_table.sql:    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='reviews' AND column_name='reply_at') THEN
fix_reviews_table.sql:        ALTER TABLE public.reviews ADD COLUMN reply_at timestamp with time zone;
fix_reviews_table.sql:    END IF;
fix_reviews_table.sql:END $$;
fix_reviews_table.sql:
fix_reviews_table.sql:-- Update RLS policies for reviews
fix_reviews_table.sql:DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Public Access Reviews" ON public.reviews;
fix_reviews_table.sql:CREATE POLICY "Public Access Reviews" ON public.reviews FOR ALL USING (true);
fix_reviews_table.sql:
fix_reviews_table.sql:-- Ensure reviews is in the realtime publication
fix_reviews_table.sql:DO $$
fix_reviews_table.sql:BEGIN
fix_reviews_table.sql:    IF NOT EXISTS (
fix_reviews_table.sql:        SELECT 1 FROM pg_publication_tables 
fix_reviews_table.sql:        WHERE pubname = 'supabase_realtime' 
fix_reviews_table.sql:        AND schemaname = 'public' 
fix_reviews_table.sql:        AND tablename = 'reviews'
fix_reviews_table.sql:    ) THEN
fix_reviews_table.sql:        ALTER PUBLICATION supabase_realtime ADD TABLE reviews;
fix_reviews_table.sql:    END IF;
fix_reviews_table.sql:END $$;

App.tsx:
App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
App.tsx:    const handleOnline = () => {
App.tsx:      setIsOnline(true);
App.tsx:      toast.success("Connexion internet rétablie", { icon: '🌐' });
App.tsx:      // Retry charging data when back online
App.tsx:      fetchRestaurants();
App.tsx:    };
App.tsx:    const handleOffline = () => {
App.tsx:      setIsOnline(false);
App.tsx:      toast.error("Vous êtes hors ligne. Certaines fonctionnalités peuvent être limitées.", { icon: '📡' });
App.tsx:    };
App.tsx:
App.tsx:    window.addEventListener('online', handleOnline);
App.tsx:    window.addEventListener('offline', handleOffline);
App.tsx:
App.tsx:    // Capture immédiate du jeton dans l'URL (Deep Link ou Redirection localhost)
App.tsx:    const handleUrlAuth = async (urlStr: string) => {
App.tsx:      try {
App.tsx:        if (!urlStr || (!urlStr.includes('access_token=') && !urlStr.includes('refresh_token='))) return;
App.tsx:
App.tsx:        
App.tsx:        // Extraction manuelle robuste (le hash n'est pas toujours géré par URLSearchParams nativement après un redirect)
App.tsx:        const getParam = (name: string) => {
App.tsx:          const regex = new RegExp('[#?&]' + name + '=([^&#]*)');
App.tsx:          const results = regex.exec(urlStr);
App.tsx:          return results ? decodeURIComponent(results[1]) : null;
App.tsx:        };
App.tsx:
App.tsx:        const accessToken = getParam('access_token');
App.tsx:        const refreshToken = getParam('refresh_token');
App.tsx:
App.tsx:        if (accessToken) {
App.tsx:          // --- EVITER LE PROBLÈME DE REBOOT INTENT SUR APK ---
App.tsx:          // Si on a déjà traité ce jeton avec succès, on l'ignore pour éviter qu'Android n'écrive par-dessus la session
App.tsx:          const lastToken = localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_last_auth_token');
App.tsx:          if (lastToken === accessToken) {
App.tsx:            return;
App.tsx:          }
App.tsx:
App.tsx:          const { data, error } = await supabase.auth.setSession({
App.tsx:            access_token: accessToken,
App.tsx:            refresh_token: refreshToken || '',
App.tsx:          });
App.tsx:          
App.tsx:          if (error) {
App.tsx:            console.error('❌ [Auth] Erreur setSession:', error.message);
App.tsx:            if (error.message.includes('expired')) {
App.tsx:              toast.error("Le lien a expiré. Veuillez recommencer.");
App.tsx:            }
App.tsx:          } else if (data.session) {
App.tsx:            console.log('✅ [Auth] Session activée via URL');
App.tsx:            // Enregistrer le token traité avec succès pour éviter que le reboot ne le traite de nouveau
App.tsx:            localStorage.setItem('dashmeals_last_auth_token', accessToken);
App.tsx:            toast.success("Connexion réussie !");
App.tsx:            
App.tsx:            // Si on est dans une popup d'authentification (Google OAuth), on informe la fenêtre parente
App.tsx:            if (window.opener && window.opener !== window) {
App.tsx:              window.opener.postMessage({ 
App.tsx:                type: 'OAUTH_SUCCESS', 
App.tsx:                session: data.session 
App.tsx:              }, window.location.origin);
App.tsx:              
App.tsx:              // Un court délai avant de fermer pour s'assurer que le message est envoyé
App.tsx:              setTimeout(() => {
App.tsx:                window.close();
App.tsx:              }, 1000);
App.tsx:              return;
App.tsx:            }
App.tsx:            
App.tsx:            // Nettoyage impératif pour éviter les boucles au refresh (sécurisé sous try-catch pour Android WebView)
App.tsx:            try {
App.tsx:              if (window.history.replaceState) {
App.tsx:                const cleanUrl = window.location.origin + window.location.pathname;
App.tsx:                window.history.replaceState({}, document.title, cleanUrl);
App.tsx:              }
App.tsx:            } catch (historyErr) {
App.tsx:              console.warn("⚠️ Impossible de nettoyer l'historique de la plateforme locale:", historyErr);
App.tsx:            }
App.tsx:          }
App.tsx:        }
App.tsx:      } catch (e) {
App.tsx:        console.error("❌ [Auth] Erreur critique parsing URL auth:", e);
App.tsx:      }
App.tsx:    };
App.tsx:
App.tsx:    // Vérifier au chargement
App.tsx:    handleUrlAuth(window.location.href);
App.tsx:
App.tsx:    // Deep link handling for Capacitor (Supabase OAuth) - sécurisé et réservé aux APKs natives
App.tsx:    let appOpenListener: any = null;
App.tsx:    if (Capacitor.isNativePlatform()) {
App.tsx:      try {
App.tsx:        CapApp.addListener('appUrlOpen', async (data: any) => {
App.tsx:          console.log('🔗 [App] Deep link reçu :', data.url);
App.tsx:          handleUrlAuth(data.url);
App.tsx:        }).then(listener => {
App.tsx:          appOpenListener = listener;
App.tsx:        });
App.tsx:      } catch (err) {
App.tsx:        console.error("❌ [App] Erreur lors de l'initialisation du listener CapApp appUrlOpen:", err);
App.tsx:      }
App.tsx:    }
App.tsx:
App.tsx:    return () => {
App.tsx:      window.removeEventListener('online', handleOnline);
App.tsx:      window.removeEventListener('offline', handleOffline);
App.tsx:      if (appOpenListener && typeof appOpenListener.remove === 'function') {
App.tsx:        try {
App.tsx:          appOpenListener.remove();
App.tsx:        } catch (removeErr) {
App.tsx:          console.error("❌ Erreur retrait listener App:", removeErr);
App.tsx:        }
App.tsx:      }
App.tsx:    };
App.tsx:  }, []);
App.tsx:  
App.tsx:  // Settings States
App.tsx:  const [theme, setTheme] = useState<Theme>(() => (localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_theme') as Theme) || 'light');
App.tsx:  const [language, setLanguage] = useState<Language>(() => (localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_language') as Language) || 'fr');
App.tsx:  const [font, setFont] = useState<AppFont>(() => (localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_font') as AppFont) || 'facebook');
App.tsx:

App.tsx:  const [creationLoading, setCreationLoading] = useState(false);

App.tsx:  const lastFetchedUserId = useRef<string | null>(null);
App.tsx:
App.tsx:  // Apply & Persist Theme
App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
App.tsx:    const root = document.documentElement;
App.tsx:    if (theme === 'dark') {
App.tsx:      root.classList.add('dark');
App.tsx:    } else {
App.tsx:      root.classList.remove('dark');
App.tsx:    }
App.tsx:    localStorage.setItem('dashmeals_theme', theme);
App.tsx:  }, [theme]);
App.tsx:

App.tsx:    const fetchUserProfile = async (userId: string, email: string, metadata: any = {}): Promise<void> => {

App.tsx:        return;

App.tsx:    
App.tsx:    isFetchingProfile.current = true;
App.tsx:    lastFetchedUserId.current = userId;

App.tsx:    // Fail-safe global pour fetchUserProfile (10 secondes max)
App.tsx:    const profileTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
App.tsx:        if (isFetchingProfile.current && lastFetchedUserId.current === userId) {
App.tsx:            console.warn("⚠️ [Auth] fetchUserProfile total timeout triggered. Forcing profile creation.");
App.tsx:            
App.tsx:            const pendingAuthDataStr = localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_pending_auth');
App.tsx:            const pendingAuthData = pendingAuthDataStr ? JSON.parse(pendingAuthDataStr) : null;
App.tsx:            
App.tsx:            let expectedRole = 'client';
App.tsx:            let expectedCity = 'Kinshasa';
App.tsx:            let expectedPhone = '';

App.tsx:                expectedCity = currentUserRef.current.city || 'Kinshasa';
App.tsx:                expectedPhone = currentUserRef.current.phoneNumber || '';

App.tsx:                const savedRole = localStorage.getItem(`dashmeals_role_${userId}`);
App.tsx:                expectedRole = pendingAuthData?.role || metadata?.role || savedRole || 'client';
App.tsx:                expectedCity = pendingAuthData?.city || metadata?.city || 'Kinshasa';
App.tsx:                expectedPhone = pendingAuthData?.phone || metadata?.phone_number || '';

App.tsx:                id: userId,
App.tsx:                email: email,

App.tsx:                role: expectedRole as UserRole,
App.tsx:                city: expectedCity,
App.tsx:                phoneNumber: expectedPhone,
App.tsx:                settings: currentUserRef.current?.settings || {
App.tsx:                    notifPush: true,
App.tsx:                    notifEmail: true,
App.tsx:                    notifSms: false,
App.tsx:                    twoFactorEnabled: false,

App.tsx:        .maybeSingle();

App.tsx:          console.warn(`Erreur lecture profil:`, error.message);

App.tsx:          // we gracefully fallback to a memory-based profile using registration details/metadata!
App.tsx:          console.warn("⚠️ [Auth] Erreur de base de données fatale ou cache Supabase détecté. Utilisation d'un profil virtuel pour autoriser la connexion.", error.message);

App.tsx:              id: userId,

App.tsx:        let profileToUpsert = null;
App.tsx:

App.tsx:            role: (preExistingProfileByEmail.role && preExistingProfileByEmail.role !== 'client') ? preExistingProfileByEmail.role : chosenRole,
App.tsx:            full_name: preExistingProfileByEmail.full_name || pendingAuthData?.name || metadata?.full_name || metadata?.name || email.split('@')[0],
App.tsx:            phone_number: preExistingProfileByEmail.phone_number || pendingAuthData?.phone || metadata?.phone_number || '',
App.tsx:            city: preExistingProfileByEmail.city || pendingAuthData?.city || metadata?.city || 'Kinshasa',
App.tsx:          };
App.tsx:        } else {
App.tsx:          profileToUpsert = {
App.tsx:              id: userId,
App.tsx:              full_name: pendingAuthData?.name || metadata?.full_name || metadata?.name || email.split('@')[0],
App.tsx:              email: email,
App.tsx:              role: pendingAuthData?.role || metadata?.role || 'client', 
App.tsx:              city: pendingAuthData?.city || metadata?.city || 'Kinshasa',
App.tsx:              phone_number: pendingAuthData?.phone || metadata?.phone_number || '',
App.tsx:              created_at: new Date().toISOString()
App.tsx:          };
App.tsx:        }
App.tsx:
App.tsx:        const { data: created, error: insertError } = await supabase
App.tsx:            .from('profiles')
App.tsx:            .upsert(profileToUpsert)
App.tsx:            .select()
App.tsx:            .single();
App.tsx:        
App.tsx:        if (insertError) {
App.tsx:            console.warn("⚠️ Erreur création profil DB:", insertError.message);
App.tsx:            profile = profileToUpsert; // Fallback mémoire
App.tsx:        } else {
App.tsx:            profile = created;
App.tsx:        }
App.tsx:      }
App.tsx:
App.tsx:        if (profile) {
App.tsx:          let businessId = profile.business_id;
App.tsx:          let computedRole = profile.role as UserRole;
App.tsx:
App.tsx:          // ── PRIORITÉ 1 : préserver le rôle provisoire si déjà non-client ──
App.tsx:          // Si on a déjà un user en mémoire avec un rôle business/delivery/superadmin,
App.tsx:          // on ne le rétrograde JAMAIS vers 'client' depuis la DB.
App.tsx:          if (
App.tsx:            currentUserRef.current &&
App.tsx:            currentUserRef.current.id === userId &&
App.tsx:            currentUserRef.current.role !== 'client' &&
App.tsx:            currentUserRef.current.role !== 'guest' &&
App.tsx:            (computedRole === 'client' || !computedRole)
App.tsx:          ) {
App.tsx:            console.log(
App.tsx:              `🛡️ [Auth] Role guard: DB returned '${computedRole}' but keeping '${currentUserRef.current.role}' from provisional user`
App.tsx:            );
App.tsx:            computedRole = currentUserRef.current.role;
App.tsx:            businessId = businessId || currentUserRef.current.businessId;
App.tsx:          }
App.tsx:
App.tsx:          // ── PRIORITÉ 2 : superadmin par email ──
App.tsx:          if (email && email.toLowerCase().trim() === 'irmerveilkanku@gmail.com') {
App.tsx:            computedRole = 'superadmin';
App.tsx:          }
App.tsx:
App.tsx:          // ── PRIORITÉ 2.5 & 3 : Deep merge metadata and DB profile ──
App.tsx:          try {
App.tsx:            const pendingAuthDataStr = localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_pending_auth');
App.tsx:            const pendingAuthData = pendingAuthDataStr ? JSON.parse(pendingAuthDataStr) : null;
App.tsx:            
App.tsx:            let profileNeedsUpdate = false;
App.tsx:            const updates: any = {};
App.tsx:
App.tsx:            const expectedRole = pendingAuthData?.role || metadata?.role;
App.tsx:            const expectedCity = pendingAuthData?.city || metadata?.city;
App.tsx:            const expectedPhone = pendingAuthData?.phone || metadata?.phone_number;
App.tsx:
App.tsx:            // Merge Role
App.tsx:            if (expectedRole && expectedRole !== 'client' && computedRole !== expectedRole) {
App.tsx:              computedRole = expectedRole as UserRole;
App.tsx:              updates.role = computedRole;
App.tsx:              profileNeedsUpdate = true;
App.tsx:            } else if ((metadata?.role === 'business' || metadata?.role === 'delivery') && (computedRole === 'client' || !computedRole)) {
App.tsx:              computedRole = metadata.role as UserRole;
App.tsx:              updates.role = computedRole;
App.tsx:              profileNeedsUpdate = true;
App.tsx:            }
App.tsx:
App.tsx:            // Merge City
App.tsx:            if (expectedCity && (!profile.city || profile.city === 'Kinshasa') && profile.city !== expectedCity) {
App.tsx:              updates.city = expectedCity;
App.tsx:              profile.city = expectedCity;
App.tsx:              profileNeedsUpdate = true;
App.tsx:            }
App.tsx:
App.tsx:            // Merge Phone
App.tsx:            if (expectedPhone && !profile.phone_number) {
App.tsx:              updates.phone_number = expectedPhone;
App.tsx:              profile.phone_number = expectedPhone;
App.tsx:              profileNeedsUpdate = true;
App.tsx:            }
App.tsx:
App.tsx:            if (profileNeedsUpdate) {
App.tsx:               console.warn(`🛡️ [Auth] Deep merging missing metadata into profile DB:`, updates);
App.tsx:               supabase.from('profiles').update(updates).eq('id', userId)
App.tsx:                 .then(({ error }) => {
App.tsx:                   if (!error && pendingAuthData) localStorage.removeItem('dashmeals_pending_auth');
App.tsx:                 });
App.tsx:            }
App.tsx:          } catch (_) {}
App.tsx:
App.tsx:          // ── PRIORITÉ 4 : auto-healing business (cherche restaurant) ──
App.tsx:          if (computedRole === 'client' || !computedRole) {
App.tsx:            try {
App.tsx:              const { data: dbResto } = await supabase
App.tsx:                .from('restaurants')
App.tsx:                .select('id')
App.tsx:                .eq('owner_id', userId)
App.tsx:                .maybeSingle();
App.tsx:              if (dbResto) {
App.tsx:                computedRole = 'business';
App.tsx:                businessId = dbResto.id;
App.tsx:                supabase.from('profiles')
App.tsx:                  .update({ role: 'business', business_id: dbResto.id })
App.tsx:                  .eq('id', userId).then(() => {});
App.tsx:              }
App.tsx:            } catch (_) {}
App.tsx:          }
App.tsx:
App.tsx:          // ── Construction finale ──
App.tsx:          if (!businessId && computedRole === 'business') {
App.tsx:            const userRestaurant = restaurants.find(r => r.ownerId === userId);
App.tsx:            if (userRestaurant) {
App.tsx:              businessId = userRestaurant.id;
App.tsx:            } else {
App.tsx:              const { data: restoData } = await supabase
App.tsx:                .from('restaurants').select('id').eq('owner_id', userId).maybeSingle();
App.tsx:              if (restoData) businessId = restoData.id;
App.tsx:            }
App.tsx:          }
App.tsx:
App.tsx:          const userData: User = {
App.tsx:            id: userId,
App.tsx:            email,
App.tsx:            name: profile.full_name || profile.settings?.fullName || metadata?.full_name || metadata?.name || 'Utilisateur',
App.tsx:            role: computedRole,
App.tsx:            city: profile.city || profile.settings?.city || metadata?.city || 'Kinshasa',
App.tsx:            phoneNumber: profile.phone_number || profile.settings?.phoneNumber || metadata?.phone_number || '',
App.tsx:            avatarUrl: profile.avatar_url || profile.settings?.avatarUrl || metadata?.avatar_url || '',
App.tsx:            businessId,
App.tsx:            deliveryInfo: profile.delivery_info,
App.tsx:            settings: profile.settings || {
App.tsx:              notifPush: true, notifEmail: true, notifSms: false,
App.tsx:              twoFactorEnabled: false, appLockEnabled: false, appLockPin: null, biometricsEnabled: false
App.tsx:            }
App.tsx:          };
App.tsx:
App.tsx:          setCurrentUser(userData);
App.tsx:          setAdminClientMode(false);
App.tsx:          currentUserRef.current = userData;
App.tsx:          setIsAppInitializing(false);
App.tsx:          setShowAuth(false);
App.tsx:
App.tsx:          if (userData.id && !userData.id.startsWith('mock-')) {
App.tsx:            initializeCapacitorPush(userData.id);
App.tsx:          }
App.tsx:        }
App.tsx:    } catch (error) {
App.tsx:      console.error("❌ [Auth] Erreur fetchUserProfile:", error);
App.tsx:      setIsOfflineMode(prev => {
App.tsx:        if (!prev) {
App.tsx:          toast.error("Impossible de synchroniser votre compte. Utilisation du mode restreint.", { id: 'sync-error' });
App.tsx:        }
App.tsx:        return true;
App.tsx:      });
App.tsx:    } finally {
App.tsx:      clearTimeout(profileTimeout);
App.tsx:      setLoading(false);
App.tsx:      setIsAppInitializing(false);
App.tsx:      isFetchingProfile.current = false;
App.tsx:    }
App.tsx:  };
App.tsx:
App.tsx:  const fetchRestaurants = async () => {
App.tsx:    try {
App.tsx:      console.log(`📡 [Restaurants] Début chargement...`);
App.tsx:      let data: any[] | null = null;
App.tsx:      let error: any = null;
App.tsx:
App.tsx:      const fullResult = await supabase
App.tsx:        .from('restaurants')
App.tsx:        .select(`
App.tsx:          *,
App.tsx:          menu_items (id, name, description, price, image, category, is_available)
App.tsx:        `);
App.tsx:
App.tsx:      data = fullResult.data;
App.tsx:      error = fullResult.error;
App.tsx:
App.tsx:      // Fallback if columns are missing (Error 42703 or 400 with specific message)
App.tsx:      if (error && (error.code === '42703' || error.message?.includes('column'))) {
App.tsx:        console.warn("⚠️ [Restaurants] Colonnes manquantes détectées, tentative avec sélection minimale...");
App.tsx:        const fallback = await supabase
App.tsx:          .from('restaurants')
App.tsx:          .select(`
App.tsx:            id, owner_id, type, name, description, latitude, longitude, 
App.tsx:            city, is_open, is_active, rating, review_count, 
App.tsx:            preparation_time, estimated_delivery_time, delivery_available, 
App.tsx:            cover_image, created_at,
App.tsx:            subscription_tier, subscription_status, subscription_end_date,
App.tsx:            menu_items (id, name, description, price, image, category, is_available)
App.tsx:          `);
App.tsx:        data = fallback.data;
App.tsx:        error = fallback.error;
App.tsx:      }
App.tsx:
App.tsx:      if (error) throw error;
App.tsx:
App.tsx:      if (data && data.length > 0) {
App.tsx:        const mappedRestaurants: Restaurant[] = data.map((r: any) => ({
App.tsx:          id: r.id,
App.tsx:          ownerId: r.owner_id,
App.tsx:          type: r.type,
App.tsx:          name: r.name,
App.tsx:          description: r.description,
App.tsx:          latitude: Number(r.latitude) || KINSHASA_CENTER_LAT,
App.tsx:          longitude: Number(r.longitude) || KINSHASA_CENTER_LNG,
App.tsx:          city: r.city || 'Kinshasa',
App.tsx:          isOpen: r.is_open === true,
App.tsx:          isOnline: (r.is_online === true || r.is_online === false) 
App.tsx:                      ? r.is_online 
App.tsx:                      : (r.settings?.isOnline !== false),
App.tsx:          isActive: r.is_active !== false,
App.tsx:          rating: r.rating,
App.tsx:          reviewCount: r.review_count,
App.tsx:          preparationTime: r.preparation_time,
App.tsx:          estimatedDeliveryTime: r.estimated_delivery_time || 20,
App.tsx:          deliveryAvailable: r.delivery_available,
App.tsx:          coverImage: r.cover_image || 'https://picsum.photos/800/600?grayscale',
App.tsx:          currency: r.currency || 'USD',
App.tsx:          exchangeRate: r.exchange_rate,
App.tsx:          displayCurrencyMode: r.display_currency_mode || 'dual',
App.tsx:          isVerified: r.is_verified || false,
App.tsx:          verificationRequested: r.verification_requested || false,
App.tsx:          verificationStatus: r.verification_status || 'unverified',
App.tsx:          verificationDocs: r.verification_docs,
App.tsx:          verificationPaymentStatus: r.verification_payment_status,
App.tsx:          subscriptionTier: r.subscription_tier,
App.tsx:          subscriptionStatus: r.subscription_status,
App.tsx:          subscriptionEndDate: r.subscription_end_date,
App.tsx:          createdAt: r.created_at,
App.tsx:          paymentConfig: r.payment_config || {
App.tsx:            acceptCash: true,
App.tsx:            acceptMobileMoney: false
App.tsx:          },
App.tsx:          settings: r.settings || {},
App.tsx:          menu: (r.menu_items || []).map((m: any) => ({
App.tsx:            id: m.id,
App.tsx:            name: m.name,
App.tsx:            description: m.description,
App.tsx:            price: Number(m.price) || 0,
App.tsx:            image: m.image,
App.tsx:            category: m.category,
App.tsx:            isAvailable: m.is_available
App.tsx:          }))
App.tsx:        }));
App.tsx:        setRestaurants(mappedRestaurants);
App.tsx:        setIsOfflineMode(false);
App.tsx:      } else {
App.tsx:        // Si on n'a pas encore fini l'init ou si on est un vrai utilisateur, on ne montre pas de mocks
App.tsx:        if (isAppInitializing || (currentUser && currentUser.role !== 'guest')) {
App.tsx:            setRestaurants([]); 
App.tsx:        } else {
App.tsx:            setRestaurants(MOCK_RESTAURANTS);
App.tsx:        }
App.tsx:      }
App.tsx:    } catch (err: any) {
App.tsx:      console.warn("Erreur chargement restaurants. Utilisation des données MOCK.", err.message);
App.tsx:      setRestaurants(MOCK_RESTAURANTS);
App.tsx:      setIsOfflineMode(true);
App.tsx:    }
App.tsx:  };
App.tsx:
App.tsx:  // Realtime subscription for restaurants
App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
App.tsx:    const channel = supabase
App.tsx:      .channel('public-restaurants-all')
App.tsx:      .on(
App.tsx:        'postgres_changes',
App.tsx:        {
App.tsx:          event: '*',
App.tsx:          schema: 'public',
App.tsx:          table: 'restaurants'
App.tsx:        },
App.tsx:        (payload) => {
App.tsx:          if (payload.eventType === 'INSERT' || payload.eventType === 'DELETE') {
App.tsx:            fetchRestaurants();
App.tsx:          } else if (payload.eventType === 'UPDATE') {
App.tsx:            // "Appelé après chaque update local" -> we ignore UPDATE here to avoid layout thrashing and extra API calls.
App.tsx:            // Component handleUpdateRestaurant already updates local state perfectly.
App.tsx:          }
App.tsx:        }
App.tsx:      )
App.tsx:      .subscribe();
App.tsx:
App.tsx:    return () => {
App.tsx:      supabase.removeChannel(channel);
App.tsx:    };
App.tsx:  }, []);
App.tsx:
App.tsx:  const handleUpdateRestaurant = async (updatedResto: Restaurant) => {
App.tsx:    // Mise à jour de l'état local uniquement pour éviter les conflits et la latence
App.tsx:    setRestaurants(prev => prev.map(r => r.id === updatedResto.id ? updatedResto : r));
App.tsx:    // Nous ne rappelons PAS fetchRestaurants() ici pour laisser l'UI fluide
App.tsx:    // La prochaine visite ou refresh chargera les données DB.
App.tsx:  };
App.tsx:
App.tsx:  // Fonction pour force la création du restaurant si l'automatisme a échoué
App.tsx:  const handleManualRestaurantCreation = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
App.tsx:    e.preventDefault();
App.tsx:    if (!currentUser) return;
App.tsx:    setCreationLoading(true);
App.tsx:
App.tsx:    const newRestaurantPayload = {
App.tsx:        owner_id: currentUser.id,
App.tsx:        name: newRestoName || "Mon Restaurant",
App.tsx:        type: newRestoType,
App.tsx:        city: currentUser.city || 'Kinshasa',
App.tsx:        description: `Bienvenue chez ${newRestoName}`,
App.tsx:        latitude: -4.325 + (Math.random() * 0.01), // Random pos near center
App.tsx:        longitude: 15.322 + (Math.random() * 0.01),
App.tsx:        is_open: true,
App.tsx:        preparation_time: 30,
App.tsx:        estimated_delivery_time: 30,
App.tsx:        currency: 'USD',
App.tsx:        exchange_rate: 2850,
App.tsx:        settings: {
App.tsx:            appearance: 'light',
App.tsx:            language: 'fr'
App.tsx:        },
App.tsx:        cover_image: 'https://picsum.photos/800/600?food'

App.tsx:            preparationTime: 30,
App.tsx:            estimatedDeliveryTime: 30,
App.tsx:            deliveryAvailable: true,

App.tsx:  const handleLogout = () => {
App.tsx:    
App.tsx:    // 1. Clear all local application sessions
App.tsx:    if (currentUser?.id) {
App.tsx:       localStorage.removeItem(`dashmeals_role_${currentUser.id}`);
App.tsx:    }
App.tsx:    localStorage.removeItem('dashmeals_staff_session');
App.tsx:    
App.tsx:    // 2. Clear all local Supabase keys and sessions to force client-side de-authentication immediately
App.tsx:    try {
App.tsx:      Object.keys(localStorage).forEach(key => {
App.tsx:        if (key.startsWith('sb-') || key.includes('supabase') || key.includes('session')) {
App.tsx:          localStorage.removeItem(key);
App.tsx:        }
App.tsx:      });
App.tsx:    } catch (e) {
App.tsx:      console.warn("Error clearing localStorage keys during logout:", e);
App.tsx:    }
App.tsx:
App.tsx:    // 3. Immediately reset UI/State to show login screen
App.tsx:    setCurrentUser(null);
App.tsx:    setIsAppLocked(false);
App.tsx:    setAuthMode('login');
App.tsx:    setShowAuth(true); // Always show auth screen after logout
App.tsx:
App.tsx:    // 4. Fire standard remote signOut in background so it doesn't block the UI
App.tsx:    try {
App.tsx:      supabase.auth.signOut().catch((e) => {
App.tsx:        console.warn("Background remote signOut failed:", e);
App.tsx:      });
App.tsx:    } catch (e) {
App.tsx:      console.warn("Error launching background remote signOut:", e);
App.tsx:    }
App.tsx:  };

App.tsx:          twoFactorEnabled: false
App.tsx:        }),

public/sw.js:  event.waitUntil(
public/sw.js:    clients.matchAll({ type: 'window', includeUncontrolled: true }).then(function(clientList) {

public/sw.js:        let client = clientList[0];
public/sw.js:        for (let i = 0; i < clientList.length; i++) {
public/sw.js:          if (clientList[i].focused) {
public/sw.js:            client = clientList[i];
public/sw.js:          }
public/sw.js:        }
public/sw.js:        return client.focus();
public/sw.js:      }
public/sw.js:      return clients.openWindow('/');
public/sw.js:    })
public/sw.js:  );
public/sw.js:});

public/privacy.html:                        <span class="bg-rose-100 text-rose-600 font-black rounded-lg w-6 h-6 inline-flex items-center justify-center text-xs mr-3">5</span>
public/privacy.html:                        Intégration OAuth Google et Tiers
public/privacy.html:                    </h2>
public/privacy.html:                    <p class="mb-2">
public/privacy.html:                        Dans le cadre de l’utilisation de la connexion par <strong>Google OAuth</strong> sur DashMeals :
public/privacy.html:                    </p>
public/privacy.html:                    <ul class="list-disc list-inside space-y-2 pl-4">
public/privacy.html:                        <li>L’application demande uniquement d'accéder à votre email principal et votre nom de profil pour l'inscription instantanée.</li>
public/privacy.html:                        <li>Aucune autre information Google, carnet d'adresses ou document personnel n'est consulté ou stocké.</li>
public/privacy.html:                        <li>Vos jetons d'identification OAuth sont gérés directement de manière unilatérale et sécurisée par Supabase Auth.</li>
public/privacy.html:                    </ul>

Vous pouvez initier la suppression totale de votre compte ou modifier vos préférences à tout moment depuis les réglages de votre profil utilisateur ou en contactant notre équipe support à l'adresse email : <strong>support@dashmeals-rdc.com</strong>.

REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:-- SCRIPT DE RÉPARATION SUPARED (MAI 2026)
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:-- Ce script ajoute toutes les colonnes manquantes et répare les relations.
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:-- À exécuter dans le SQL Editor de Supabase (https://supabase.com/dashboard/project/_/sql)
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:DO $$ 
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:BEGIN
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    -- 1. RÉPARATION DE LA TABLE ORDERS
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='orders' AND column_name='exchange_rate') THEN
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:        ALTER TABLE public.orders ADD COLUMN exchange_rate double precision;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    END IF;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='orders' AND column_name='delivery_location') THEN
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:        ALTER TABLE public.orders ADD COLUMN delivery_location jsonb;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    END IF;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='orders' AND column_name='proof_url') THEN
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:        ALTER TABLE public.orders ADD COLUMN proof_url text;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    END IF;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='orders' AND column_name='delivery_person_id') THEN
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:        ALTER TABLE public.orders ADD COLUMN delivery_person_id uuid REFERENCES public.profiles(id) ON DELETE SET NULL;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    END IF;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='orders' AND column_name='delivery_acceptance_status') THEN
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:        ALTER TABLE public.orders ADD COLUMN delivery_acceptance_status text CHECK (delivery_acceptance_status IN ('pending', 'accepted', 'rejected')) DEFAULT 'pending';
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    END IF;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    -- 2. RÉPARATION DE LA TABLE RESTAURANTS
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='restaurants' AND column_name='exchange_rate') THEN
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:        ALTER TABLE public.restaurants ADD COLUMN exchange_rate double precision DEFAULT 2800;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    END IF;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='restaurants' AND column_name='currency') THEN
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:        ALTER TABLE public.restaurants ADD COLUMN currency text DEFAULT 'USD';
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    END IF;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='restaurants' AND column_name='display_currency_mode') THEN
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:        ALTER TABLE public.restaurants ADD COLUMN display_currency_mode text DEFAULT 'dual';
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    END IF;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='restaurants' AND column_name='is_verified') THEN
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:        ALTER TABLE public.restaurants ADD COLUMN is_verified boolean DEFAULT false;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    END IF;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    -- 3. RÉPARATION DE LA TABLE MESSAGES (CHAT)
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    -- S'assurer que order_id est de type TEXT
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    ALTER TABLE public.messages ALTER COLUMN order_id TYPE TEXT;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='messages' AND column_name='recipient_id') THEN
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:        ALTER TABLE public.messages ADD COLUMN recipient_id uuid REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    END IF;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    -- 4. RÉPARATION DES NOTIFICATIONS
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='notifications' AND column_name='restaurant_id') THEN
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:        ALTER TABLE public.notifications ADD COLUMN restaurant_id uuid REFERENCES public.restaurants(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    END IF;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='notifications' AND column_name='type') THEN
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:        ALTER TABLE public.notifications ADD COLUMN type text;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    END IF;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    -- 5. RÉPARATION DE LA TABLE PROFILES (RLS)
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    ALTER TABLE public.profiles ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Public Read Profiles" ON public.profiles;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    CREATE POLICY "Public Read Profiles" ON public.profiles FOR SELECT USING (true);
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Public Access Profiles" ON public.profiles;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    CREATE POLICY "Public Access Profiles" ON public.profiles FOR ALL USING (true) WITH CHECK (true);
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    -- 6. RÉPARATION DE STAFF_MEMBERS (si elle existe)
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name='staff_members') THEN
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:        IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='staff_members' AND column_name='role') THEN
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:            ALTER TABLE public.staff_members ADD COLUMN role text;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:        END IF;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:        -- Fix relationship for joined queries (Join with profiles instead of auth.users for PostgREST)
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:        ALTER TABLE public.staff_members DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS staff_members_user_id_fkey;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:        ALTER TABLE public.staff_members ADD CONSTRAINT staff_members_user_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES public.profiles(id) ON DELETE SET NULL;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:    END IF;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:END $$;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:-- Correction forcée de la contrainte de clé étrangère (Elle doit pointer vers PROFILES, pas staff_members)
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:ALTER TABLE public.orders DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS orders_delivery_person_id_fkey;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:ALTER TABLE public.orders ADD CONSTRAINT orders_delivery_person_id_fkey 
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:FOREIGN KEY (delivery_person_id) REFERENCES public.profiles(id) ON DELETE SET NULL;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:-- 5. RELAXATION DU RLS POUR LE DÉVELOPPEMENT
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:ALTER TABLE public.orders ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Public Access Orders" ON public.orders;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:CREATE POLICY "Public Access Orders" ON public.orders FOR ALL USING (true) WITH CHECK (true);
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:ALTER TABLE public.messages ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Public Access Messages" ON public.messages;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:CREATE POLICY "Public Access Messages" ON public.messages FOR ALL USING (true) WITH CHECK (true);
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:ALTER TABLE public.notifications ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
REPARATION_MAI_2026.sql:DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Public Access Notifications" ON public.notifications;

translate.cjs:const fs = require('fs');
translate.cjs:
translate.cjs:const filesToProcess = [
translate.cjs:  'components/CustomerView.tsx',
translate.cjs:  'BusinessDashboard.tsx',
translate.cjs:  'components/DeliveryView.tsx',
translate.cjs:  'components/SuperAdminDashboard.tsx'
translate.cjs:];
translate.cjs:
translate.cjs:function replaceInFile(filePath, replacements) {
translate.cjs:  if (!fs.existsSync(filePath)) return;
translate.cjs:  let content = fs.readFileSync(filePath, 'utf8');
translate.cjs:  let originalContent = content;
translate.cjs:
translate.cjs:  // Make sure useTranslation is imported and instantiated if replacing with t()
translate.cjs:  // Actually, some files might not have `const t = useTranslation(language)`
translate.cjs:  
translate.cjs:  for (const [search, replace] of Object.entries(replacements)) {
translate.cjs:    // Escape string for regex if needed, or just use string replace loop
translate.cjs:    // BUT we have to be careful with quotes when replacing hardcoded text with {t('some_key')}
translate.cjs:    // A regex approach:
translate.cjs:    const regex = new RegExp(`>\\s*${search}\\s*<`, 'g');
translate.cjs:    content = content.replace(regex, `>{t('${replace}')}<`);
translate.cjs:    
translate.cjs:    const regex2 = new RegExp(`>\\s*${search}\\s*\\{`, 'g'); // Handle "Text {variable}"
translate.cjs:    content = content.replace(regex2, `>{t('${replace}')} {`);
translate.cjs:  }
translate.cjs:
translate.cjs:  if (content !== originalContent) {
translate.cjs:    fs.writeFileSync(filePath, content, 'utf8');
translate.cjs:    console.log(`Updated ${filePath}`);
translate.cjs:  }
translate.cjs:}
translate.cjs:

fix_notifications_final.sql:-- 1. S'assurer que la table notifications existe avec les bonnes colonnes
fix_notifications_final.sql:CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.notifications (
fix_notifications_final.sql:    id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY,
fix_notifications_final.sql:    user_id UUID REFERENCES public.profiles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE NOT NULL,
fix_notifications_final.sql:    title TEXT NOT NULL,
fix_notifications_final.sql:    message TEXT NOT NULL,
fix_notifications_final.sql:    type TEXT NOT NULL, -- 'message', 'order_status', 'new_order', 'support', etc.
fix_notifications_final.sql:    data JSONB DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
fix_notifications_final.sql:    is_read BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
fix_notifications_final.sql:    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
fix_notifications_final.sql:);
fix_notifications_final.sql:
fix_notifications_final.sql:-- 2. Activer RLS
fix_notifications_final.sql:ALTER TABLE public.notifications ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
fix_notifications_final.sql:
fix_notifications_final.sql:-- 3. Politiques de sécurité
fix_notifications_final.sql:DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Users can view their own notifications" ON public.notifications;
fix_notifications_final.sql:CREATE POLICY "Users can view their own notifications"
fix_notifications_final.sql:    ON public.notifications FOR SELECT
fix_notifications_final.sql:    USING (auth.uid() = user_id);
fix_notifications_final.sql:
fix_notifications_final.sql:DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Users can update their own notifications" ON public.notifications;
fix_notifications_final.sql:CREATE POLICY "Users can update their own notifications"
fix_notifications_final.sql:    ON public.notifications FOR UPDATE
fix_notifications_final.sql:    USING (auth.uid() = user_id);
fix_notifications_final.sql:
fix_notifications_final.sql:DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Anyone can insert notifications" ON public.notifications;
fix_notifications_final.sql:CREATE POLICY "Anyone can insert notifications"
fix_notifications_final.sql:    ON public.notifications FOR INSERT
fix_notifications_final.sql:    WITH CHECK (true);
fix_notifications_final.sql:
fix_notifications_final.sql:DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Users can delete their own notifications" ON public.notifications;
fix_notifications_final.sql:CREATE POLICY "Users can delete their own notifications"
fix_notifications_final.sql:    ON public.notifications FOR DELETE
fix_notifications_final.sql:    USING (auth.uid() = user_id);
fix_notifications_final.sql:
fix_notifications_final.sql:-- 4. Activer le Realtime pour les notifications
fix_notifications_final.sql:-- On vérifie d'abord si la table est déjà dans la publication
fix_notifications_final.sql:DO $$
fix_notifications_final.sql:BEGIN
fix_notifications_final.sql:    IF NOT EXISTS (
fix_notifications_final.sql:        SELECT 1 FROM pg_publication_tables 
fix_notifications_final.sql:        WHERE pubname = 'supabase_realtime' 
fix_notifications_final.sql:        AND schemaname = 'public' 
fix_notifications_final.sql:        AND tablename = 'notifications'
fix_notifications_final.sql:    ) THEN
fix_notifications_final.sql:        ALTER PUBLICATION supabase_realtime ADD TABLE notifications;
fix_notifications_final.sql:    END IF;
fix_notifications_final.sql:END $$;
fix_notifications_final.sql:
fix_notifications_final.sql:-- 5. Recharger le schéma pour PostgREST
fix_notifications_final.sql:NOTIFY pgrst, 'reload schema';

sql/create_app_settings.sql:  )
sql/create_app_settings.sql:  OR (auth.jwt() ->> 'email' = 'irmerveilkanku@gmail.com')
sql/create_app_settings.sql:);

fix_delete_policies.sql:-- FIX FOR DELETION POLICIES
fix_delete_policies.sql:-- Execute this in your Supabase SQL Editor
fix_delete_policies.sql:
fix_delete_policies.sql:-- 1. Support Tickets
fix_delete_policies.sql:DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Admins can delete tickets" ON public.support_tickets;
fix_delete_policies.sql:CREATE POLICY "Admins can delete tickets"
fix_delete_policies.sql:  ON public.support_tickets FOR DELETE
fix_delete_policies.sql:  USING (
fix_delete_policies.sql:    EXISTS (
fix_delete_policies.sql:      SELECT 1 FROM public.profiles
fix_delete_policies.sql:      WHERE id = auth.uid() AND role = 'superadmin'
fix_delete_policies.sql:    )
fix_delete_policies.sql:    OR (auth.jwt() ->> 'email' = 'irmerveilkanku@gmail.com')
fix_delete_policies.sql:  );
fix_delete_policies.sql:
fix_delete_policies.sql:DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Users can delete their own tickets" ON public.support_tickets;
fix_delete_policies.sql:CREATE POLICY "Users can delete their own tickets"
fix_delete_policies.sql:  ON public.support_tickets FOR DELETE
fix_delete_policies.sql:  USING (auth.uid() = user_id);
fix_delete_policies.sql:
fix_delete_policies.sql:-- 2. Restaurants (Ensure Superadmin can always delete)
fix_delete_policies.sql:DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Superadmin can delete everything" ON public.restaurants;
fix_delete_policies.sql:CREATE POLICY "Superadmin can delete everything"
fix_delete_policies.sql:  ON public.restaurants FOR DELETE
fix_delete_policies.sql:  USING (
fix_delete_policies.sql:    EXISTS (
fix_delete_policies.sql:        SELECT 1 FROM public.profiles
fix_delete_policies.sql:        WHERE id = auth.uid() AND role = 'superadmin'
fix_delete_policies.sql:    )
fix_delete_policies.sql:    OR (auth.jwt() ->> 'email' = 'irmerveilkanku@gmail.com')
fix_delete_policies.sql:  );
fix_delete_policies.sql:
fix_delete_policies.sql:-- 3. Profiles (Explicit Delete Policy for Superadmin)
fix_delete_policies.sql:DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Superadmin can delete profiles" ON public.profiles;
fix_delete_policies.sql:CREATE POLICY "Superadmin can delete profiles"
fix_delete_policies.sql:  ON public.profiles FOR DELETE
fix_delete_policies.sql:  USING (
fix_delete_policies.sql:    EXISTS (
fix_delete_policies.sql:        SELECT 1 FROM public.profiles
fix_delete_policies.sql:        WHERE id = auth.uid() AND role = 'superadmin'
fix_delete_policies.sql:    )
fix_delete_policies.sql:    OR (auth.jwt() ->> 'email' = 'irmerveilkanku@gmail.com')
fix_delete_policies.sql:  );
fix_delete_policies.sql:
fix_delete_policies.sql:-- 4. Messages
fix_delete_policies.sql:DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Admins can delete messages" ON public.messages;
fix_delete_policies.sql:CREATE POLICY "Admins can delete messages"
fix_delete_policies.sql:  ON public.messages FOR DELETE
fix_delete_policies.sql:  USING (
fix_delete_policies.sql:    EXISTS (
fix_delete_policies.sql:        SELECT 1 FROM public.profiles
fix_delete_policies.sql:        WHERE id = auth.uid() AND role = 'superadmin'
fix_delete_policies.sql:    )
fix_delete_policies.sql:    OR (auth.jwt() ->> 'email' = 'irmerveilkanku@gmail.com')
fix_delete_policies.sql:  );
fix_delete_policies.sql:
fix_delete_policies.sql:-- 5. Foreign Key Constraints (Ensure CASCADE)
fix_delete_policies.sql:DO $$
fix_delete_policies.sql:BEGIN
fix_delete_policies.sql:    -- support_tickets -> profiles
fix_delete_policies.sql:    IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.table_constraints WHERE constraint_name = 'support_tickets_user_id_fkey') THEN
fix_delete_policies.sql:        ALTER TABLE public.support_tickets DROP CONSTRAINT support_tickets_user_id_fkey;
fix_delete_policies.sql:    END IF;
fix_delete_policies.sql:    ALTER TABLE public.support_tickets ADD CONSTRAINT support_tickets_user_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES public.profiles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;
fix_delete_policies.sql:
fix_delete_policies.sql:    -- restaurants -> auth.users
fix_delete_policies.sql:    IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.table_constraints WHERE constraint_name = 'restaurants_owner_id_fkey') THEN
fix_delete_policies.sql:        ALTER TABLE public.restaurants DROP CONSTRAINT restaurants_owner_id_fkey;
fix_delete_policies.sql:    END IF;
fix_delete_policies.sql:    ALTER TABLE public.restaurants ADD CONSTRAINT restaurants_owner_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY (owner_id) REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;
fix_delete_policies.sql:END $$;
fix_delete_policies.sql:
fix_delete_policies.sql:-- 6. Fix verification_status check and default
fix_delete_policies.sql:ALTER TABLE public.restaurants DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS restaurants_verification_status_check;
fix_delete_policies.sql:ALTER TABLE public.restaurants ADD CONSTRAINT restaurants_verification_status_check 
fix_delete_policies.sql:    CHECK (verification_status IN ('unverified', 'pending', 'verified', 'rejected'));
fix_delete_policies.sql:ALTER TABLE public.restaurants ALTER COLUMN verification_status SET DEFAULT 'unverified';
fix_delete_policies.sql:
fix_delete_policies.sql:-- Update existing restaurants that might be 'pending' without reason
fix_delete_policies.sql:UPDATE public.restaurants SET verification_status = 'unverified' 
fix_delete_policies.sql:WHERE verification_status = 'pending' AND (verification_docs IS NULL OR verification_docs::text = '{}');

relax_messages_rls.sql:-- RELAX RLS FOR MESSAGES
relax_messages_rls.sql:-- Exécutez ce script dans Supabase > SQL Editor
relax_messages_rls.sql:
relax_messages_rls.sql:-- Drop existing strict policy
relax_messages_rls.sql:DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Users can insert messages for their orders" ON public.messages;
relax_messages_rls.sql:
relax_messages_rls.sql:-- Create a more permissive policy for development/debugging
relax_messages_rls.sql:-- Allows any authenticated user to insert a message as long as they are the sender
relax_messages_rls.sql:CREATE POLICY "Users can insert messages"
relax_messages_rls.sql:ON public.messages FOR INSERT
relax_messages_rls.sql:WITH CHECK (auth.uid() = sender_id);
relax_messages_rls.sql:
relax_messages_rls.sql:-- Ensure Select policy is also permissive enough for now
relax_messages_rls.sql:DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Users can view messages for their orders" ON public.messages;
relax_messages_rls.sql:CREATE POLICY "Users can view messages"
relax_messages_rls.sql:ON public.messages FOR SELECT
relax_messages_rls.sql:USING (true);
relax_messages_rls.sql:
relax_messages_rls.sql:-- Force schema reload
relax_messages_rls.sql:NOTIFY pgrst, 'reload schema';
